9NPDN9R45JX4.title: One of the best stories in gaming.
9NPDN9R45JX4.text: The only reason to play this game is for the story. It has one of the best in gaming. There is not much "gameplay" per say and it was made on a simple budget, but if you can ignore it's faults, then you will experience one of the most thrilling, heart wrenching dramas ever put into this medium.
One of the best written games you'll ever play.

9NPDN9R45JX4.title: Played on Steam 100% Achievements
9NPDN9R45JX4.text: Deep philosophical game, an interactive art piece.

9NPDN9R45JX4.title: Unlike anything else
9NPDN9R45JX4.text: It's hard to put into words how remarkable this game is, not only in the complexity of it's story and its themes but in the way the story is delivered to the audience. The gameplay consists of walking around and talking with very little choice in dialogue and story progression, characters mouths don't move when they speak, the graphics for most the game are sterile with low textures and details, but for some reason that doesn't take away anything from this highly emotional and utterly deep narrative. It stands as the very best in terms of world building, acting, and writing that I've seen in…

BWVBNCMF22ZK.title: Loved it! Great gameplay!
BWVBNCMF22ZK.text: I love the multiplayer layout of the game, so unique. The game seems to focus on the two main characters, but in different aspects, which is amazing in my opinion. Making decisions as a team while playing couch co-op was so much fun. I will definitely be playing this game again and I recommend it to anyone who loves local multiplayer, or multiplayer in general. Good game playing by yourself too, but so much better working with someone else.

BWVBNCMF22ZK.title: Amazing
BWVBNCMF22ZK.text: Ive been playing games for over 20 years and this is the first game I have ever wrote a review for. Some may not like how its not a long play through, but in the time the story gets you immersed into the characters. By the end you are invested into who they are and what you think would happen. Only story drivin game I have ever felt their pain and happiness at the same time. The ending, well is AMAZING!! Never saw it coming like other story games where you can predict what will happen. Some things could have been a little better and maybe longer but the story alone makes up for it. I'm a…

BWVBNCMF22ZK.title: An Interactive Drama
BWVBNCMF22ZK.text: This game is one of the best I've played in a while. At first the co-op only requirement turned me off, but I ended up buying it and my cousin joined me(Only one of you needs to own a copy to play together). We both had the day off from work and ended up finishing the game. We couldn't stop, the story had its hooks in deep. Its not a perfect game by any means, for instance the driving portion of the game had me begging God for patience. The ending was a brilliant touch as well. I sincerely hope we get another, similar game from the creators of this one.

BWVBNCMF22ZK.title: Awesome!
BWVBNCMF22ZK.text: My roommate and I had a fantastic time with this game. Emotionally it pulls you in many directions. Love how it's coop only and uses this to it's advantage. Highly recommend!

9P4NV23Q6QC2.title: I Just Got Randy Ortoned
9P4NV23Q6QC2.text: Had never heard from this game before but from the previews it looked like yet another Flavor of the Month FRIEND SLOP ala Peak, Lethal Company etc Boy was I wrong, Yeah some of the players will play it co-op but this game was made to be done solo. Lorewise it makes sense. And the lore and atmosphere is incredible. Part Half-Life, part SCP, no other survival game compares. Youre not Gordon Freeman, youre just a nerdy scientist surviving horrors with makeshift armor from office supplies and weapons that shoot pens. Not since Subnautica has a survival game kept pushing me onward to keep…

9NR6NJ401NBS.title: A Beautiful Roguelite Beat'em Up
9NR6NJ401NBS.text: It feels like a modern spiritual successor to the old Capcom D&D Arcade games from the 90's (Tower of Doom & Shadows Over Mystara). The background artwork feels thoughtful and lovingly crafted with little nods to the previous areas you have travelled at times. As you progress through your run, the different areas you discover feel unique and memorable with their own lore, enemies and lore and bosses. I also appreciate the assistance settings where you can tone down the enemy damage or increase you/your partners damage so you can find the sweet spot for the difficulty you would prefer. I do…

9P8NKVVB0XQJ.title: Great for shooter fans
9P8NKVVB0XQJ.text: Whoever on the gamepass team picked this and Roboquest needs a promotion. If you like challenging shooters with interesting boss design and lots of dodging, this is as good as it gets. There is definitely some jank, but there isn't a AAA game like this. Basically hades but a M+K shooter with really really interesting boss design. Call up Asha and gives these people a real budget, they're making real games

9P8NKVVB0XQJ.text: I have this on steam and have 100% everything (Except the new free dlc). I cannot recommend enough, if you like FPS/Roguelikes you will enjoy it.

9NJWTJSVGVLJ.title: Oh Sweet Nostalgia.
9NJWTJSVGVLJ.text: Keeping the old with a new skin is precisely what I wanted from this DE. I wanted the old cheat codes to work still. I wanted the old maps to be the same. I wanted all the problems that I remember from my childhood sneaking to the computer at 11pm on a school night. I thank you to the developers who simply game this broken masterpiece a graphical and technical upgrade to play on modern computers. The downsides for me were: Narration of campaign starts. I hate it, please take more cues from AoE2 narration.

9NJWTJSVGVLJ.title: Bringing and uplifting one of the best game ever
9NJWTJSVGVLJ.text: I don't understand why this game has such a low rating. As a person who's parents played age of empire as a kid and always enjoyed watching and snuck to play it to now having an updated version plus being able to play the original. This games is fantastic. The graphics, the campaign is not only great but has its challenges. This game is beyond brilliant. Can't wait for definitive II. Hands down counting the days. Thank you for bringing a great game back and make it better. also the windows version is by far better than steam

9NJWTJSVGVLJ.title: Ok game once Xbox Live profile is configured
9NJWTJSVGVLJ.text: At first I left a negative review about this game since I had a hard time getting it to load and play. But after downloading the various Xbox apps and setting up an Xbox account, everything worked. I've had it crash once, but my graphics card is subpar and I had another program running in the background. It was fun to go back to the late 90s when I was a teenager with this game. The game play and graphics are improved over the original and it is a fun game. But if you're trying to decide between AOE 1 and 2, I would recommend skipping this one and heading straight for the second.

9NJWTJSVGVLJ.title: Amazing Remake, Nostalgic
9NJWTJSVGVLJ.text: This 1997-98 game from the past is a legend and has been the righting in stone for RTS followed up by TW (2000-01) AOE Rise of Rome expansion! It's a legend that doesn't need a review. Thank You all for the wonderful remake!

9N42SSSX2MTG.title: AMAZING GAME
9N42SSSX2MTG.text: This is a great game. been playing 10 years. Its quite shocking to see how many people play it still. Still receiving updates, and loads of modded content as well. Its hard to get bored :) thank you!

9N42SSSX2MTG.title: Much can be spoken of this classic!
9N42SSSX2MTG.text: Throughout late middle school and high school, during the early 2000s, our computer lab had this installed on the whole campus network. People didn't goto parties where I went to school, instead they all stayed afterschool to hangout in the computer lab and play AOE2 together. The game ended up being integrated, momentarily, into our eighth grade curriculum where we were sent to the computer lab to play as nations we were learning about. Students would huddle into segregated groups during lunch to plan and discuss strategies and tactics to use against other student groups in-game. So not only…

9N94NCGM1Q2N.title: When I was poor and growing up...
9N94NCGM1Q2N.text: AoE:II was the first game I ever played on the PC and my Mom had picked it up for me for my birthday when I was about eleven years old in 2001 and it had already been out for a while-I played every faction everyday I could. We were really poor with my dad having broke his back and leg at work when I was 8 so having something to do that was so fun really kept the sadness at bay when I was alone at home with my dad passed out in pain or from surgery and my Mom working three jobs. Now I'm 32 and finding this game again is akin to resparking a sort of happy memory in me it creates a smile on my…

9N94NCGM1Q2N.title: THE BEST
9N94NCGM1Q2N.text: Fan of the series since the very beginning, this installment brought amazing memories back. Yet this is the best version ever of the game. Can't wait for the fifth installment and thank you for bringing age of empires back to faithful fans and to new players.

9N94NCGM1Q2N.title: New player addicted!
9N94NCGM1Q2N.text: First time playing Age of Empires and I am hooked. Forcing myself to get off this game to go to bed now... But looking forward to spending a lot of time with this game. Great story mode so far, learning some interesting history.

9N94NCGM1Q2N.title: This game was absolutely worth the wait!!
9N94NCGM1Q2N.text: 24 years ago my dad brought home for my brother and I each a copy of the first Age of Empires game, I was seven at the time and it opened up a whole new world for me! Now, decades and many different consoles and genre trends later, it's so nostalgic to come back to PC gaming and have AoE 4 come out. Everything about this game feels like the natural result of 24 years; the graphics look beautiful and the game runs like a dream, the gameplay mechanics are exactly the same but with natural and rewarding updates, and the campaign experience has been a delight as someone who has really enjoyed the…

9PDC9X7BKZR3.title: Ya'll need to read
9PDC9X7BKZR3.text: The reason F2P games get added to GamePass is because you get free paid content within the game. For example, Fortnite including all of the Battlepasses + 1000 in-game currency every month. So it makes sense for it to show up in their catalog. They're not just pretending to add a free game. Sure, the game might suck, but review based on the quality of the game, not Xbox's garbage marketing team. That said, they should probably rethink how they group these into GamePass and roll their additions out, because I love getting free content in the F2P games I do play, but people clearly don't…

9NG07QJNK38J.title: Reminds me as my days as a young man.
9NG07QJNK38J.text: I remember back in the 1950's me as a soviet scientist was trying to find a way to make a spaceship that could withstand the wear and tear of the atmosphere. The spaceship in this game reminds me of the model that I was going for that my boss had turned down because it was "too hunky". It's great to see that my idea has come to life in this amazing game. Soon I will die but the memory of me will live on forever in the minds of these young children who play this game. Thank you. Have a great day.

9MVSRJWZBG9G.title: The Hardest Game in Elder Scrolls
9MVSRJWZBG9G.text: Every choice you make in this game matters. There are no towns. There is no currency. There is only the one long slog through an endless series of dimensions ruled by demons. The controls are weak as are the graphics, but we're talking about a reboot of a 1997 game. What matters is the gameplay. And it's very difficult. Very much a worthwhile game to play.
It looks like I'd like to have a word with the Seducer.

Plus, can't go wrong when it's on GamePass. Give it a try!!

9P97ZTRTH25W.title: Adorable Game - Great for New Players!
9P97ZTRTH25W.text: The Soulslike genre is a type of game that I have always admired, yet directly stayed away from. These games are hard! And for all of you out there who are good at them I applaud you. But also, the kinda same vibes/art style a lot of these games have also disinterested me. I love the gothic and edgy look, but with so many fitting that mold I just didn't see a point where it would lure me in. But this game? WOW. Not only is the art style so adorable but it's welcoming in a way that allows me to learn this genre fully. And now, because of this game, I want to try out the other popular titles in…

9P97ZTRTH25W.title: uhm... wow
9P97ZTRTH25W.text: It plays like a souls-like, however the combat is MUCH more enjoyable than most other games that use this formula. There is a lot of combat options once you get past the first major boss (the game starts a tad slow until you unlock shells, just tough it out), you'll have access to a skill tree that lets you focus on different playstyles, either going pure offensive, pure defensive, or focus on special attacks, or combine them however you want. During combat you'll have access to parrying, dodging, blocking, aerial dodging, jumping & jump attacks, charged attacks, special attacks, your shells…

9P97ZTRTH25W.title: Better than any game about crabs has any right to be
9P97ZTRTH25W.text: Really good Souls lite with a decent story, funny moments and references, enjoyable exploration, and decently challenging, but forgiving combat puzzles in a low stakes world. Super fun. Really enjoyed this sophomore release from a newer developer. I'd love to see a sequel some day.

9P97ZTRTH25W.title: FAVORITE GAME OF 2024 SO FAR
9P97ZTRTH25W.text: I originally wanted a good art style underwater game. What I got was one of my favorite soulslike games ever, albeit the easiest one. (There are ways to make the game easier in settings if this is off-putting for anti-souls people) Within 2 hours I was hooked. Exploring was a joy and it was way more of a ride than I anticipated. It has it's issues but it was really a refreshing game. Clearly fans of spongebob, and dark souls. Really hope they make a sequel. If they do I'll be there day 1.

9NK8947Z28XL.title: Enjoyable
9NK8947Z28XL.text: Short story but I definitely enjoyed playing it.

9PDDRVKPF6KG.title: I'm so glad it's not just a civ clone
9PDDRVKPF6KG.text: The game does have some work to do on it still, so I'm happy I got it on game pass. I still love the game as it fleshes out the economy and trade by utilizing a sophisticated production chain/web. The pacing is very similar to a Civ VI epic game which is my favorite way to play. The Combat is pretty, and once you get into the iron age you have to start utilizing formations, but I haven't had a really satisfying war just yet. I will probably increase the difficulty above the default. The UI is clunky and I'm not sure you can even upgrade obsolete troops. If you can, I cannot for the life of me…

9PDDRVKPF6KG.title: It's interesting but has some flaws
9PDDRVKPF6KG.text: I recently gave this game some negative points but after my 2nd game they became invalid. It takes awhile to get used to the UI, that's about it but after you do - your playtime goes by fast. Give the game a 2nd / 3rd chance and it'll click and it'll be easy to understand. It's like Civilization but with the resource management like in the Victoria series.
Combat is really good but the leaders are boring. They need unique mechanics, units, and/or buildings. They all pretty much just have stat tweaks and no actual differences beyond that.

9PDDRVKPF6KG.title: One...More....Turn
9PDDRVKPF6KG.text: I just spent three hours playing this game and it doesn't disappoint; it has a layer of complexity that Civ doesn't have and is a worthy alternative.

9P33VJGVPHVP.title: THIS GAME HAS RUINED MY LIFE
9P33VJGVPHVP.text: Ever morning, I wake up and my first thought to myself is, "Have I been raided?" When I realize I was already raided, the anxiety leaves. Then I get a text from my tribemate, saying out rathole has been discovered and to hop on. I have school in 30 minutes. I call out. I play for eight hours to defend the one cryo fridge of 3 tames I have left. Then, I get food. I don't shower. I play the game through the night and grind 250k ARB. I fall asleep for thirty minutes and wake up to the sound of turrets. A hacker flies into my base and rocket launches me in the face. I'm raided. This process…

9NXQKPGMHH9G.title: An old favorite I hope to see reborn.
9NXQKPGMHH9G.text: Back when I first played Arx Fatalis years ago, I absolutely loved the innovative and immersive spellcasting and crafting systems. Long before Minecraft brought about the concept of killing animals with fire damage to get cooked meat, I was fireballing chickens and pigs for their tasty vittles in Arx Fatalis. This is a game I sincerely hope Arkane Studios takes another look at for either a remaster or, even better, a sequel, taking advantage of modern hardware and engines to give us an open world experience like no other. With a combination of VR and voice recognition, this could easily be a…

9NXQKPGMHH9G.title: Black screen on launch fix!
9NXQKPGMHH9G.text: I saw people saying the game launches and minimizes constantly. So here is the fix! Go into Arx Fatalis's game files (whatever your localization might be) and look for a file called CFG, change fullscreen to 0 and you can play the game in the base res or you can input 1920x1080 and play the game at full screen! I hope this helps!

BRKMHZX1RCF2.title: A Pirate's Life For Me
BRKMHZX1RCF2.text: Black Flag is a fun title, however it depends on how much you liked the gameplay of the previous games. The second to last game to feature the classic style of Assassin's Creed, Black Flag's controls, combat, and level design are noticeably dated and clunky. The main story is lengthy, the open world is huge, and there's plenty of side activities, but again the fun factor depends on how much you liked the previous games. Black Flag has FAR too many tailing missions, some even taking place on your boat. The combat is easy but clunky and sometimes unresponsive. The camera frequently has trouble…

I enjoyed the ship elements (it's not a boat!!!), and had just enough of it to satisfy that Pirate itch, Pirates are cool!!! Some say this isn't a real AC game? LOL. It's an AC game and a good one. The landscapes, the objects, the characters, everything. The score is great too. The combat is a less than perfect copy of the Witcher III. Slash-slash-slash-stab-roll-repeat is a summary of every combat encounter. The true joy of the game comes from attempting stealth, thinning out enemy bases one foe at a time. Th plot is sadly transparent, and while the voice…

BZGJRJC1FGF3.title: Another great AC game with better controls
BZGJRJC1FGF3.text: Still one of my favorite AC games ever. The world is beautifully done and does well with keeping up with the history and lore of Egypt. It allows you to complete objectives however you want, except for most bosses that you have no choice but to use the hack/slash method. I like the controls much better than previous AC games, it feels more natural to me instead of having to hold a button just to run (my index finger got really tired/sore…

That being said this is still a very good AC game that is worth playing.

9MSVPJCHHRPR.text: I was pretty lukewarm on Avowed for the first few hours of my playthrough because I was disappointed the game wasn't more like Skyrim. For anyone who is saying the characters are lame and the story is mid.. you clearly haven't sunk yourself deep enough into the game. Every action has a reaction that becomes revealed later in the story. Every character adds meaning to the way you progress…

9PKWJSJ4NWC7.title: An interesting time! Fascinating character depth!
9PKWJSJ4NWC7.text: I'm currently on day five and have gotten VERY invested in whatever Wilbur/Miguel/Pickman/Bam have got going on (if you know, you know). But John's the current bestie goal, currently pegged him as a secret tsundere, I'm onto you pal. It's so interesting to watch as each inmate's story unfolds via the daily gossip, even when you don't befriend them. There's so much going on: a running scam, your cellmate's oncoming parole, one prisoner in debt is DEFINITELY about to die, a gang war is brewing that will definitely involve everyone (bystanders or not), different guards have different perks and…

9PKWJSJ4NWC7.title: Top tier prison simulator
9PKWJSJ4NWC7.text: To call it "furry prison simulator" feels like underselling it. There's a lot of characters here, a lot of replay value, tons of small details that prove how much they really cared about bringing this story to life. By having different opportunities available at different times, the gameplay loop always keeps you changing your mindset and looking forward to what you want to accomplish next. Immersive, engaging, and oozing with personality. Warning: THE FOOD IN PRISON SUCKS

9PKWJSJ4NWC7.title: Masterpiece!
9PKWJSJ4NWC7.text: I cant belive how hard this game hooked me from the beginning! Its as if were getting a look into the nitty gritty reality of the dark side of "Zootopia". Insane depth to every 8-bit character. NO repeating dialogue. Freedom to choose the "life" you live in prison. Whether you'd like to get in good with the guards to get a nicer cell and privileges, or creating friction as you work your way into one of the three gangs throughout the prison making all the money you can. All and all, I think its a masterpiece for the vision the devs wanted to portray! I can only hope for more content in the…

BP15SF17LH13.title: Still On My Favourites
BP15SF17LH13.text: I've had BF4 for years on countless consoles yet I keep coming back and playing the hell out the still active multiplayer community. BF1 is okay, however the modern warfare and rush given in BF4 far beats BF1. If you like modern warfare, an arsenal of sexy weapons, and, I don't know, Russians? Then don't let the age of this game stop you from buying it.

BP15SF17LH13.title: The peak of the series
BP15SF17LH13.text: There are so many good parts about this game such as the variety of maps that you can play on, the level of customization for weapons and vehicles, the party ability, the server/map search ability and even the offline firing range you can do to test out your class and vehicles. A true master piece. Hpe they come back to this style soon

BPL68T0XK96W.title: DICE did it again.
BPL68T0XK96W.text: Of all the first person shooters I've played, this one is by far the best. The graphics are so incredibly realistic, the gameplay handles very smoothly, the selection of weapons is amazing, and it really shows you the shock and terror of war. The War Stories, multiplayer, and operations are all perfectly crafted to the point of this game making you feel like you're actually on the Battlefield. In multiplayer and operations, every now and then you will come across a few players who don't use their class the way they're supposed to be used. But it's not that big of a problem. The fact that you…

BPL68T0XK96W.title: An Epic Experience
BPL68T0XK96W.text: Battlefield 1 is a game that will frequently leave you frustrated and angry, as you seemingly get shot out of nowhere, and die all too often. However, occasionally, something magical will happen. Your team will be on the verge of defeat, where all hope seems lost, and yet, they will keep fighting. Perhaps through a cunning change of tactics, your team will persevere against overwhelming odds, and together you will emerge as the victor. Such moments might have you jumping up and down, and you may even notice a tear falling from your eye. Few games offer that kind of experience, and the music…

BPL68T0XK96W.title: FUN
BPL68T0XK96W.text: Fun to play. Not like that BF5 crap. This is the real deal!

BPL68T0XK96W.title: This game has progressed!!
BPL68T0XK96W.text: This game has progressed over many updates to be one of the finest shooters out. The next one is even better called Battlefield V

BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.title: Amazing Game
BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.text: I'm rating this 100% based on a solo campaign mode of play. Also this is my first time playing the battlefield series, so I have nothing to compare/contrast to other versions. That being said, I don't see why there is so much negative feedback. This game blows me away with the level of detail and realism included on the One X. The game is absolutely beautiful. The action is intense, and feels like I'm in the heart of war. The storyline is good and holds my attention. I've played other FPS games that definitely offer "more" when it comes to weapons, upgrades, etc., and I do slightly miss some…

BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.title: A game isn't great, its what you make of it.
BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.text: I have been playing BFV for a week now and I am liking were this game is going. DICE did a great job with it. If you look past the ones who drag this game in the ground because of the different meta, lack of feature that's not there yet or a implementation you don't like. Their is a lot that I don't like and wish they have not did or wish they approached it differently. But the one thing I know for sure this game delivered, that DICE tried to succeed so many years ago but failed and that's teamwork and teamwork is BF, without it, its just COD. The correspondence of a team is vital and…

BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.title: Love It Even With It’s Flaws
BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.text: The pros greatly outweigh the cons. The Battlefield series has always had its road bumps, but just like every Battlefield before it, the battles are fun and addictive. From a Battlefield vet since BF2, this game is a great addition to the series. There is room for improvement but I still can’t stop playing.

BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.title: Why the hate?
BZ2N7TQ0XCF2.text: I honestly don’t know what all this hate is about the game is fun to play and runs well

9NQVDQS2BC10.title: Excellent game - BattleTech rules!
9NQVDQS2BC10.text: Very good installation of the BattleTech / Mech Warrior game in both content, gameplay and enjoyability! Great combination of Mechs, strategy and simulation in this turn based game. There were a few initial hiccups with the game not saving but the recent update a couple weeks ago fixed that and I have been logging many hours in the pursuit of hammering the evil empires of tyranny throughout the BattleTech universe.

9NQVDQS2BC10.title: Storytelling and Authenticity
9NQVDQS2BC10.text: Great game - played on Steam via Kickstarter backing, but I love the authenticity of this game. It's a great adaptation of BattleTech to turn-based strategy. There is a compelling story - great righting with solid voice efforts. This isn't fancy cut scenes but just great storytelling to keep you engaged.

9NQVDQS2BC10.title: It's Battletech

9N8H4RRSRV2S.title: Dead Cells level impact with deep build variety
9N8H4RRSRV2S.text: BlazBlue Entropy Effect delivers an incredibly satisfying combat experience. The hit feedback feels tight and responsive, very reminiscent of Dead Cells, with every strike, dash, and combo landing with real impact. Combat flows smoothly at high speed, encouraging aggressive play while still rewarding precision and timing. What really stands out is the variety of weapon and skill combinations. Each run allows you to experiment with different builds, and the way weapons, passives, and modifiers interact makes every playthrough feel fresh. Even with the same character, different combinations can…

The formula itself is enjoyable and you have lots of characters to unlock and combine weapons you maxed the level of into a new Level 1 weapon that can itself be upgraded again. However, it feels like it's too difficult to kill enemies to get anywhere after the first 5…

I'm Enjoying this game so far for what it is... an indie game quick progression, closed-world rpg with quick progressions and limited time investment. 9P66TM1HLGLX.title: Lara Croft is a woman? OH, NO!
9P66TM1HLGLX.text: This is a perfectly good, light RPG to kill some time with. I swear, the people complaining about this game being "woke" or having an agenda would have called Tomb Raider "woke b.s." because Laura Croft has girl parts. When did it become a problem for a game (or SF movie or superhero movie or comic book) to have a female lead? It hasn't always been this way. Maybe these people are just a vocal minority, and *they* have always been this way. I'd like to think that's the case, rather than acknowledging that humanity is getting angrier and more hateful by the day.

9PFRTPRQ569Q.title: Brilliant Design

It evoked a feeling and interest that has become so rare in modern times (speaking as someone who has played for 30+ yrs of games). My hope is that you are someone who will catch the sickness, get bitten by the bug, and will want to figure out the game. Part rouge-lite, part modern puzzle game, park deck builder - the comparisons pale to the completion of the whole. There is an incredible synergy here. Go in blind, but there's no harm in researching and coordinating online for…

9PFRTPRQ569Q.title: One of the best games ever made.
9PFRTPRQ569Q.text: The game rewards your efforts and patience. On what appears to be a simplistic surface, incredible depth emerges as one puts hours into this game. I will not dare spoil lt. On the more negative reviews, I imagine may be some people with low hours (you need about 20+ hours for the game to start revealing itself). To say the puzzles are simplistic or repetitive simply is to not have delved deep into the game. The puzzles and strategy are often subtle and dynamic in scale, appearing small but becoming grand as the story becomes more and more compelling and the world keeps opening and opening.…

BWMQL2RPWBHB.title: The Summit is Worth it.
BWMQL2RPWBHB.text: I'm not someone that often plays platformers, but too many people have recommended I play this, so I finally gave it a try. This is now my favorite platformer I have ever played and its on my favorite games of all time list. It's a game about climbing a mountain, but you'll learn that it's so much more. The subject matter of the story hit very close to home, and ended up being one of the most beautiful experiences in gaming for me. If you are willing to push through a lot of difficulty, reaching that summit is very much worth the journey.

Just don't bother buying the extra gem packs or any of that. It's a waste of money and basically you're paying for an advantage you don't need and will aquire easily with a little game play. It only has two difficulty levels. Casual and Expert. I found expert to…

BQ9Q620NC614.title: One of the best, beautiful, exciting games ever.

The music and the dialogue are incredible in every way shape and form. The battle sequences took very little to adjust to and now I love how complex some battles can be when switching between the different characters. The story is very well written and actually had me reading and following along (I am usually a button masher until I take control again). Most of the bad reviews are people who don't know how to properly leave…

C4GH8N6ZXG5L.title: Favorite City Game
C4GH8N6ZXG5L.text: Cities: Skylines is a comprehensive city sim with many interweaving systems that are deeply satisfying once you understand them. Understanding every aspect of this game, however, is an undertaking in itself. You'll have to think like a real city planner if you want your city to flow smoothly, the key to which is learning the logic your cim's use to determine their optimal route, and the places they like to go. I play this game slowly, expanding my cities piece by piece and observing how everything changes. I've poured hours into 4 other cities before I finally created one that works in a way…

BSLTQT4L0RLV.title: Top-Notch Game
BSLTQT4L0RLV.text: This game was fantastic. I saw the movie Coraline in 3D in the theater. Playing this game was like that. The art, the music, the puzzles (clever but not frustrating), the voice acting, the story... all top-rate. The surreal world presented made me stop short every so often just to take it all in. I would recommend this game to anyone looking for a "games as art" type aesthetic. Look forward to a sequel someday!

BZ6W9LRPC26W.title: Very good

BZ6W9LRPC26W.title: Take. Control.
BZ6W9LRPC26W.text: Control was one of the more challenging games I've played. But it was all worth the effort. The learning curve is smooth. There's an amazing story that you won't be able to stop thinking about for days. And there's a sequence in this game which gave me goosebumps and tears. It is THE MOST AMAZING thing I've ever experienced in a game. It made the purchase totally worth it. You'll know it when you see it, hard to miss. Buy this game if any of these apply: You liked Alan Wake. You liked Quantum Break. You want to experience the most amazing graphics, lighting and visual effects you've seen in a…

BZ6W9LRPC26W.title: One of the best games I’ve ever played.
BZ6W9LRPC26W.text: This game is amazing. Hands down one of the most unique stories and gameplay. Very atmospheric and intriguing. The story keeps you hooked wanting to know more and more. I actually read all of the collectibles to learn more about the story. The side quest feel like they have a purpose and aren’t just fetch quest. The gameplay is awesome. You build Jesse to become a serious bada**. Once that muscle memory sets in, the combat flow is beautiful and you feel untouchable. The physics in this game are top notch and almost everything is destructible. Yes, the frame rate drops but ONLY when you leave…

9P7LVXNVQ6K7.title: Great game, missing some DX12 improvements
9P7LVXNVQ6K7.text: This is a great game. People giving this 1/5 stars because it's missing some DX12 optimizations? Frankly, that's childish and short sided. We're giving the game the same rating as something that has a game breaking bug- whether it's on startup or 5 seconds into the first level? OMG. I feel for the teams who work so hard on these releases and then read these reviews. People, stop just review bombing things and have some context of games in general. Is this really a 1 star game because it's missing DX12 support? That said - you can tell lots of people have put a lot of time into this app. While…

9P7LVXNVQ6K7.title: Am I the only one?

Aside from the story itself (5/5 stars), I really cannot understand why people are having problems with the game stability. I didn't have a single crash on me throughout the whole playthrough. Bear in mind that I've played this game with my old trustworthy i5 3570k paired with r9 380x 4GB. Then I've "upgraded" my PC with an entirely new system, and it still didn't have any problems whatsoever running the game with 0 crashes. As far as the game itself its…

Unfortunately I am sad I have to play this game solo though as I don't have many friends that play these types of games. Im sure its…

9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.title: for those with issues on pc
9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.text: with some trial and error, i got the game running in ultrawide (native res) at a stable 60fps. this game, like many from the era, needs to run at 60fps for the code not to break. there are ways to achieve a higher frame rate, but this results in crashes and weird gameplay bugs. when the game launches and goes full screen, hit alt+enter. this will force the game into a window. you might have to hit it again as the first time made it full screen with focus, so a 2nd input will make it a window. now, go into the settings and set it to whatever you want. the higest fps you see, enable vsync,…

9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.title: Change screen resolution
9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.text: At EULA privacy agreement press UP ENTER At main menu press UP ENTER DOWN DOWN ENTER and should be able to see resolution size, hope this helps

9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.title: Great Throwback Games!
9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.text: Anyone having issues with screen size, go into the game, and get into a level, then use Alt and Enter and it should fix your issue! Worked for me, hopefully it works for you!

9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.title: problems on pc? choose 60 fps
9NJ2FD5HJ7SB.text: go into system > display > advanced display and set your refresh rate to 60 hz. that is the only way i got mine to work on pc.

C27XPR5XDMFT.title: 1 of the most fun video games I have played
C27XPR5XDMFT.text: 1 of the most fun video games I have ever played. It is awesome to play the trilogy of this video game that has been updated with the 3D graphics & audio of 2018. It was fun playing through all the levels of all 3 games & doing the best I can to achieve the goals in all 3 games. I highly recommend this game to anyone who loves Crash Bandicoot video games. I hope that eventually there will be a sequel that has Crash Bandicoot: The Wrath of Cortex & Crash Bandicoot: TwinSanity.

BQRB60PW2SDL.title: Ya'll are ridiculous.

What you should really be up in arms about are the awful servers in a game where timing is crucial in terms of blocking an item or close finishes. No dedicated servers and the awful pit stop could bring it down to a 4/5 for me but absolutely no lower than that.

BQRB60PW2SDL.title: Must buy
BQRB60PW2SDL.text: Wow! I can't believe all the negative reviews... really? This game is something my siblings and I played all the time when we were young kids. We absolutely loved this game. I love seeing the remix and new weapon charges and layouts. It's a great hit and always fun to play. For those who didn't play the original game all those years ago, it's super fun if you love silly racing games.

BQRB60PW2SDL.title: Its a Good Remake (I dont care with MTX)

9NKF2SZ630ZH.title: Hot men with paddles explore life together on the field
9NKF2SZ630ZH.text: What makes a man enjoy cricket? Whether we deny it or not, the real world of cricket is unknowable. Yet this simulation allows you to become a professional cricket player in a world of men trying to find themselves. Your secrets, your motivations -- everything you leave on the field giving 110%, and everything left you have to give... where does it go? Live this life.... live your best life -- go be a professional cricket player. Know the unknowable -- the intimate bond you share with your teammates. It is your raison de'etre.

C4B8XR1LCXR5.text: A fun and engaging game that is very replayable. Wish list for a remastering includes making it open world (rather than linear storyline) and adding an open warfare online battle mode. (Would say the same about another game of the era, Metal Arms -- remastered, open world)

C4B8XR1LCXR5.title: A classic reborn.
C4B8XR1LCXR5.text: Who would have thought an Xbox original would be my favorite game on Xbox one? This quasi open-world dog-fighter is a blast.

C4B8XR1LCXR5.title: We Deserve a New Crimson Skies But This Remains Great
C4B8XR1LCXR5.text: Some of these corporate suits cant seem to get their heads around bringing back something that hasn't already got recent sales figures on them. It's why we see endless COD and Battle Royale clones and less inventive work with old ideals that were truly original and have so much room for expansion upon a return. Crimson Skies is a perfect example of doing something different, but making a fun adventure done right with the enjoyment of what flight brought in days of old freedom to explore and the buccaneer hijinks of piracy. It knew well how to do open maps and given reasons to explore, and yet…

C4B8XR1LCXR5.title: Great Game, but display issues in multi-player
C4B8XR1LCXR5.text: Excellent game I played on original XBOX. I bought it for the XBOX One. About a year into playing it, starting having resolution issues with player 2. Static white lines appear on the TV and any monitor I attach and increases with intensity when you boost the plane... sort of like static interference on old televisions. Multiple updates have been made to the game and XBOX One since and it is still a problem. Someone else reported the same issue. Please fix.

9N7GG222GTTH.title: Excellent Game

9N7GG222GTTH.title: Great game with game pass problems.
9N7GG222GTTH.text: It's a great game, there are other reviews that explain that. I just wanted to write this: If your game is not opening, it's your virus scanner. You might think, that's wrong, I created an exception, or, I looked and nothing is blocked! It's still your virus scanner. Turn Avast off, or whatever else you are using. Open your task manager and make sure Crusader Kings is not running as a background process, if it is, kill it. Then restart it. If it doesn't work, it's windows defender. Same deal. I created exceptions, I checked my blocked programs, nothing works other than disabling virus…

BX3M8L83BBRW.title: Alright, David. Let's go. To the top, then
BX3M8L83BBRW.text: i honestly don't know what to say. i've never felt such a way for a video game franchise or its anime spin-off before. this is the most beautiful, most intriguing game from the 2020s so far. i've never been so eager to play a game as i have been for this one since gta iv. personally, i started playing this around november of 2023 on both xbox and pc, so i can't speak for the game before it was fixed. however, while still a bit unpolished this game is insanely fun and welcoming for different playstyles. phantom liberty also brings a great, fleshed-out story which is perfect for those craving…

BX3M8L83BBRW.title: A little buggy, but a lot of heart
BX3M8L83BBRW.text: I've been enjoying it since day 1, and while there are definitely bugs that need to be worked out, it's not an unplayable mess. The devs created an amazing game here - once the wrinkles are ironed out, it will be even better!

BX3M8L83BBRW.title: A classic game - move over GTA
BX3M8L83BBRW.text: This game is fantastic. The foundations for the best game ever written are in place. It is only a matter of time before Cyberpunk surpasses all others in the RPG genre. To be clear, something this complex needs more work and I look forward to seeing it evolve and expand. I am sure it will. CD Project Red studio is well established and make that happen. IMO, it's well worth a purchase. Download the trial version, play it and decide for yourself.

BX3M8L83BBRW.title: Amazing game with Keanu Reeves.
BX3M8L83BBRW.text: The story is one of the most engaging and interesting story's I've experienced in a while. The gun play is not as polished as a dedicated shooter, if your looking for super intense gunplay this is not that, but guns are still fun to use. The driving in this game is rough but gets the job done, I never make it to my destination without a dent or two. This game as a whole is amazing and deserves a sequel. Keanu Reeves is in the game which automatically gives it 5 stars. There's a good amount of Keanu in the game, not just a one and done side quest.

9N1M64W9XZQ7.title: Tactical
9N1M64W9XZQ7.text: Fun tactical game, in a spooky setting. I have fun with the open maps giving you plenty of options to tackle an objective. I wish it was a little more immersive by having a better animation system for your squad. They could take a knee when stopped, spread out.. Little things like keeping people that we are rescuing on the outer circle of the squad is distracting, as any good marine squad would keep civilians in the center of the formation. Overall it's a good game, just wished it would feel a little more "next gen" and more realistic animations for the squad

9N1M64W9XZQ7.title: Fantastic Game
9N1M64W9XZQ7.text: I actually bought this game when it came out on Steam. It captures the essence of classic sci-fi horror with a modern twist. The game beautifully blends real-time strategy with intense survival elements, evoking the claustrophobic dread of the original Alien franchise. Its dynamic squad-based gameplay keeps you on edge, forcing every decision to count as you navigate dimly lit corridors filled with lurking Xenomorphs. The story and atmosphere draw you in, with moments that feel like a haunting callback to the iconic films. For fans of tactical strategy and deep immersion, Alien: Dark Descent…
You know how sometimes you just want to see a full out fightback moment for humans and the Xenomorphs? This is basically that feeling all the way.

9N1M64W9XZQ7.title: Unexpectedly really fun
9N1M64W9XZQ7.text: Establishing a well rounded squad is incredibly satisfying, and the xcom style base upgrades are actually impactful. Only three missions in, but I find myself just having fun exploring maps and strategizing encounters.

9NKK6CX54183.title: Awesome follow up

9NKK6CX54183.title: Hilarious trip down memory lane
9NKK6CX54183.text: I remember playing Maniac Mansion, and this along with the sam and max games back in the 90's so I was really excited to see they had made improvements on this revision of Day of the Tentacle. I have to say it is even better than I remember it. Def a fun game for people who like puzzle/riddle games, and like games from this era.

BSR9NLHVF1KL.text: I used to play Day Z through Steam and enjoyed it quite a bit. Started again on Xbox with game pass and I am really enjoying it. The game has its bugs and the KOS mentality that sort of ruined it for me is still prevalent but I just sort of accept it as part of the deal of an apocalyptic world. This game is brutally unforgiving and you will die a lot. Those constant hardships make success so much more rewarding IMO. This just isn't a game for everyone but if you like the idea of really having to work for progress and can get over some of the bugs then this game can provide you with lots of…

The main reason why I would not give this game a 5 star review though, is because of 80% of the player base. In my experience, 20% of the players I run into on the coast do not kos and are friendly (good side). As for the other 80%, they are a mix of people who do not have and or use a mic who kill on sight,…

C0N22P73QZ60.title: Debunking reasons why people don't like this game. Salt
C0N22P73QZ60.text: This game is great, but this rating isn't true. Imo, this game should be 5 stars. The reason why people rate this so low is because of: killers camping, bad connection, and bad community. Killers camping is in no reason good, but there is no made up honor code to serve, killers do as they please, and survivors need to find a tactic. (They even made the hooks savable from other sides.) Then there is the servers. People say that it's the servers, but this game is made up purely on connecting to the host: a peer to peer connection. If the host is bad, you will lag. Lastly, the community. Of all…

C0N22P73QZ60.title: A GREAT GAME TO PLAY!!!!
C0N22P73QZ60.text: i loved this game the hook for me was the licensed iconic movie slashers michael freddy ghost face ect. as a huge horror fan that f****** rocks if your a achievement hunter theirs plenty to earn and content keeps coming game keeps getting updated bugs keep getting fixed and i find the overall game fun the game is simple its the same mode with same rules but always different every character has a different strategy to master. visually its not the most appealing game its graphics are not the best however i wouldn't let that get in the way of this overall fun game easy 5/5 :D

9NKVX66J0ZSK.title: Smoooooth gameplay
9NKVX66J0ZSK.text: This is one of my favorite games. I own it on multiple platforms so I was ecstatic I could play it on Xbox now that it's on gamepass as well. It can be difficult if you're not used to this type of game, but the responsiveness of all your actions and the ability to block/dodge in the middle of most animations gives it a fairly high skill cap. I love games that give you both great in-game progression, and also progression in your own ability to navigate the combat just by learning the weapons/enemies/movement mechanics.

This game is legendary. As of the time of writing, there are only 3 1 star reviews and they are either "I don't like rouglites" "PC crashes when I open it" or "Too hard". Ignore those, this game is perfect. Awesome soundtrack, awesome weapons, awesome idea with an awesome execution. The game is very difficult, but easy to start out playing and get good over time. Bosses are all very unique with their own arena, soundtrack, and attacks. Same goes for the common enemies. Tons of different routes to go and lot of cool ways to minmax your character in a run as well. Overall, this game is more…

BQSCNS1T8PHQ.title: Lives up to the hype

BQSCNS1T8PHQ.title: Clever, beautiful, addictive

9NLB6V0GNC9P.title: Well worth the money

9NLB6V0GNC9P.title: remake worth replaying?

Isaac now speaks & more work has been carefully added to Hammond & Kendra plus even the crew now have there own voice. whats not too like about a graphical improvement? i'd say the nercomorphs appear even more dead than alive with the frostbite engine. oh my,.. whaats that sound? yep even the echoes (wispers) of issacc growling stomach had been revamped to spook anyone with an open ear. an amazing remake with finishing polishes makes me smile

9NLB6V0GNC9P.title: A Brutal Journey Through the Ishimura
9NLB6V0GNC9P.text: Dead Space is a gripping and atmospheric survival horror game with incredible combat, rich environmental storytelling, and top tier visuals and sound. The Ishimura is tense and immersive from start to finish, and the progression and performance feel great. The characters are not the strongest part, but the overall experience is intense, polished, and absolutely worth playing.

BRJLJ6RPLQTJ.title: I can't believe this was released 11 years ago.
BRJLJ6RPLQTJ.text: I can't believe this game was released in 2008. It is GORGEOUS still in 2019. The audio is also one of the best in any game I have ever played. The music has you on edge the entire time and sometimes I can't tell if its my footsteps I'm hearing or something else's. Some of the best lighting mechanics I've ever seen as well. This game is pretty terrifying, but its story is so gripping that it kept me wanting to come back for more. So glad I finally grew a pair and played this.

BRJLJ6RPLQTJ.title: Great
BRJLJ6RPLQTJ.text: After all of these years, it still holds up

9MXWL7VJ2SJW.title: Lost in the Fog: No Fear, No Guidance
9MXWL7VJ2SJW.text: Has a cool alien‑invasion premise and unique vibe, but the tension never lands. The isometric driving feels awkward, and there’s no clear story or big goal to follow. Missions are confusing or hard to come by, NPCs rarely give useful hints, so you spend a lot of time guessing what to do and walk/drive around. It’s also unclear that you must dismiss companions to take new ones, which makes progression confusing.

9PD9SZGNCMDZ.title: Great concept
9PD9SZGNCMDZ.text: This game is super neat. Gives similar vibes to inscryption and the story immediately had me hooked. Love the world and map design as well. definitely worth checking out

9PD9SZGNCMDZ.title: Very fun and atmospheric
9PD9SZGNCMDZ.text: I love the artstyle of the game, and the gameplay doesn't disappoint. there are many cards to collect to make your own unique build and I've only played a tiny amount of the game so far. The battle system is kind of a cross between slay the spire and into the breach.

9PD9SZGNCMDZ.title: Grief & Moving on
9PD9SZGNCMDZ.text: A strategic card-based tiled game centered around shamanism and death, processing terrible events that led to one's death and learning to let them go.

9PD9SZGNCMDZ.title: I like it
9PD9SZGNCMDZ.text: Deckbuilding +movement reminds of fights in tight spaces, im only at the second area but there is a lot of potential in this game, In know it coins itself as a souls like deckbuilder... Im not sure how its a souls like- other than the bonfires and dying a lot I am not sure it is a soulslike ...ITs more like FITS or KINTS than anything else. the beginning cards are a little basic but it gets more complex as the game goes on, each battle is like a puzzle rather than pure card play

9NQGN8TGNT8P.title: THE BEST GAME EVER NOW ON XBOX
9NQGN8TGNT8P.text: I played on ps5, beat it. The i got it on pc. And now i have it here. This game represent so many things for me and what it means to be human, and stay connected is necessary for all of us. And when bad days comes, just "keep on keeping on" 👍🏻

9NQGN8TGNT8P.title: Cloud Saves Fixed!
9NQGN8TGNT8P.text: You're probably wondering why the review score for this highly regarded game is so low? It's because for a long time, the PC version of the game suffered from a bug that caused you to lose more progress the longer you played. That has been rectified, so you can enjoy the game again, and move between platforms if you choose to do so without any save glitches. Enjoy!

9NQGN8TGNT8P.title: Unexpected!
9NQGN8TGNT8P.text: Great game that I’ve played a bit on PC, but definitely switching to this version. Very excited to continue the bizarre trip on both my Ally X and my Xbox Series X!

9NQGN8TGNT8P.title: Incredible Experience.
9NQGN8TGNT8P.text: That's exactly what this game is; an experience. It's about hearing and interacting with the world around you and making you really think about the story being told. Game ran fine on my computer except in the evening Updaam area, which is a problematic area for a lot of people according to reddit. It was still completely playable though. I never had any crashes or bugs. This game solidifies Arkane as one of my favorite modern…

In the old games you had a lot of risk from the prospect of going off track, but now everything has walls/invisible walls to keep you on the track. Also doesn't have a rewind function for those looking for a racing game with it.

The story is really good. It's really, really good. And you have so many choices. The game expects everything from you. For example, if you kill the Crown Killer before even finding out who they are, the game's like "okay" and you can still proceed. And…

9P1N07XDL1D4.title: Love the Dishonored series
9P1N07XDL1D4.text: I've always been a big fan of this series, this being the first it is still by far my favorite. Also, I just seen a review that gave the game one star simply because it gave no achievements despite him beating the game. Honestly, if they'd just read the games description on the app they'd know that achievements are not active for this game. What a dumb reason to give a game that you enjoyed enough to complete a bad rating simply because they didn't take the few seconds it takes to read. Anyways that is a bit off topic. It just seemed a bit petty.

9P1N07XDL1D4.title: Immersive sim revival
9P1N07XDL1D4.text: This game fits in to a very niche genre "immersive sim" where compared to Skyrim or Fallout, which are an inch deep and a mile wide, these games are a mile deep and an inch wide. Sure you can rush through the levels, but the point is to explore, and do the level your own way. That could be stealth lethal, stealth nonlethal, stealth ghost, assault, etc.. There are always multiple ways to complete each level. It's a spiritual successor to Thief, Looking Glass games, and is one of the most effortful, player in mind, passionate, best games of all time.

9N6Z8DQXSQWH.title: A historical document
9N6Z8DQXSQWH.text: I feel this game is important and worthy of discussion because it attempts to recreate the physical location of the actual Disneyland park as it was in the time this game was originally released (2011 for Xbox 360 with Kinect). This version of the game (released 2017 for PC and Xbox One), which can use a standard controller or keyboard + mouse, allows more fine exploration and control, so you can really get up close to the details the developer put into their recreation of the Disneyland park. While not 1:1, many elements are exactly where they would be found inside the actual park, from…

9P5S26314HWQ.title: Just let them take your money

It can be challenging at times as you're often thrown into difficult encounters, but once you learn to use the enviornment, weapons, and strategies for defeating specific demons to your advantage, then you won't have too much trouble. DOOM takes a bit to get used to, due to new enemies, equipment, and combat mechanics that are introduced early on, but is rewarding once you do. The music that accompanies you whilst slaying multitudes of demons makes for really fun gameplay. You can also…

9P5S26314HWQ.title: Amazing Game

It's a whole lot more momentum based than it's predecessor released in 2016 which this is obviously a sequel of and if you enjoyed the pistol in that game you'll be sad to hear that it's not in this one but it got replaced by the shotgun.

9P5S26314HWQ.title: Not for the easily frustrated, so give it a chance
9P5S26314HWQ.text: This is the best DOOM game I've ever played (the original was the first computer game I ever owned). I hate it...but I love it! I nearly quit during the second level, but kept at it, because, hey, it's DOOM. It's VERY challenging and the jumping and swinging are excessive at times but once you get the hang of it, it's really fun to play Spiderman. The puzzles to progress are challenging but not impossible. Sure, it's frustrating to begin with, but you start seeing patterns as you go along and where secrets could be hiding and it gets easier. I really enjoy the tension buildup between big…

9PK09BL31FK1.title: Saving to a different drive
9PK09BL31FK1.text: For those that don't want to save this game to your C: Drive. You can always change that. Windows Settings -> Click "System" -> Click "Storage Settings" -> Click "Change where new content is saved" -> Change "New apps will save to:" to your other drive Hope this is helpful :)

Nothing beats absolutely demolishing your enemies with your favorite gun combo (Mine's flaming hot super meat hook with rocket launcher) or grinding the slayer gates to get the most overpowered weapon in the game. And the last boss fight? Incredible. You slay demons while feeling like an absolute Chad the whole time it's literally amazing, especially the Mars part where…

9PH9X0760B0T.title: DOOM: The Dark Ages – Fun, But Flawed
9PH9X0760B0T.text: DOOM: The Dark Ages is fun, stylish, and brutal—but not without flaws. The environments and soundtrack are outstanding, and the action is still fast-paced and satisfying. However, the removal of traditional Glory Kills in favor of less cinematic "Glory Strikes" significantly dulls the impact. Even worse, the game takes a major step back in violence and gore—two elements that defined the modern DOOM identity. Cutscenes are longer, with more dialogue and exposition than ever, which slows the pacing and feels out of place in a franchise built on nonstop carnage. The new shield-saw is great, but…

9PH9X0760B0T.title: Awesome
9PH9X0760B0T.text: First Doom game Ive actually sat and played through. Extremely fun, fast, chaotic. Gameplay and weapons make the game a blast as you get into it. I ran around with my shield and super shotgun and just parried everything. Incredibly satisfying. Would recommend.

You can create armors & weapons with stats & upgrades, you can even tint your armors. There are class restrictions for weapons & armor, but companions can be outfitted unlike DA2. The dialogue is fairly extensive & some choices have consequences, but that mostly pertains to companions. It definitely has better RPG elements than 2, but isn't close to DAO. Side quest…

BSDX4FNNC0DK.title: What a surprise!

All these negative reviews are purely due to the non binary character which to be fair is very in your face when you get to their side quests. This game has excellent combat, runs incredibly smoothly, very very few bugs for a game of its size, excellently acted, great story that brings in Inquistion characters and an incredible ending. 5/5

BSDX4FNNC0DK.title: Officially obsessed!

I’ve played all Dragon Age and Mass effect games as well as Star Wars Knights of the rebellion and every game is unique and its own game even if it’s within a specific series. I really hope for more Dragon age in the future and DLC would be amazing. I played this game on release day and I’ve played it so many times because that’s BioWare for you.

I loved the Iron Rig DLC. it had a good side story that finished off well, it tied into the base map locations in a way that wasn't intrusive, and was overall a solid…

9NXVPTB0FXSZ.title: Combat Tetris

9NXVPTB0FXSZ.title: Carcassonne Tetris Roguelike Strategy?? Yes Please!!
9NXVPTB0FXSZ.text: The game hits the spot! Reminds me of Ball X Pit, but far more strategic and a few less explosions. The tutorial isn't deep, but it feels like more than enough to get you into the easy difficulty. Defeated the final boss on easy on the first run. Normal won't let you walk through the game, but its a card-based roguelike! Gotta read the cards folks. So glad this got added to Gamepass! Will gladly trade more hours of my life for block shaped satisfaction.

9NXVPTB0FXSZ.title: Great spin on a strategy game
9NXVPTB0FXSZ.text: Took me a few tries to understand how the mechanics worked and to remember that there's a strength chart for unit types. Still I enjoyed the game a lot and it was an unexpected spin

9NXVPTB0FXSZ.title: Strategy Rogue-lite Tetris
9NXVPTB0FXSZ.text: If you ever played Tetris, but wished the blocks were pieces of land, and they gave you resources to battle your enemies with, then you'll like this game. The tutorial isn't hard if you can read. Can you read? I hope you can read. You'll need to read what the cards do too. In between matches, you'll get a card, which is usually a new tetris block for you to play with. Also there's a ton of stuff to unlock, which is always fun. Anyway, if you like tetris, and you like Rogue-lites, you'll love this game.

9P59J86GHDGL.title: Cool weird concept, worth a try!
9P59J86GHDGL.text: Game premise is interesting. It's borderline silly but it's fun. You can feel the developer passion while making it. The music is dope, it goes from Hip-Hop to Rock. The game can be very repetitive and there's not a lot of variety if you intent to finish it. But it's short. It's generous with the Gamerscore, you can get 1K in under 2 hrs if you rush it. I'm glad I could play this game. Videogames! 🤘

9PGX472J0RJP.title: A Unique and Relaxing Dungeon Diver
9PGX472J0RJP.text: So far I've had a fantastic time with Dungeons of Hinterberg. The stylized art style is incredibly unique and engaging, and the atmosphere in the game is very relaxing. Even though you're fighting your way through a dungeon with monsters of all sort, there is no urgency or intensity that demands precise inputs. I found this to be refreshing after coming from multiple ARPGs that let you mow down hordes of enemies. It combines elements of Persona (daily calendar, social standing, etc) and action adventure games to create a fantastic mix that I can't wait to spend more time with.

9PGX472J0RJP.title: Great Game
9PGX472J0RJP.text: Beautiful Dungeon Design ( Done about 8 and they get better each time) / Chill Life Sim that can be skipped through if you need constant sweatiness. Puzzles are challenging and the atmosphere is super relaxing. Highly recommend just getting lost in it. GG

9PGX472J0RJP.title: This game does what nintendont

9PGX472J0RJP.title: Fantastic

Like Animal Crossing meets a delivery simulator with some atmospheric almost horror feel. The game is unfortunately short, but there is still a lot to do. Still had a lot of fun, and still coming back to make deliveries from time to time. Just driving around with the low-fi mixes playing, while exploring this cozy and yet kind of creepy world, is the best part. Not for everyone, but I sure enjoyed it, and still do! PS, if you want more accurate reviews, check this games…

9PDC8J1BSV8B.title: Display options?
9PDC8J1BSV8B.text: Good game, awesome retro graphics, and nostalgic tone. However, there are no display options on PC, so I did not play this game full screen. Also, there is no simple way to quit out of the game either. Of course, these are minor inconveniences that I know ways around, but I like it when a game gives me all the accessibility options upfront.

9PDC8J1BSV8B.title: Great Chill Delivery Game

Its somehow both a horror game and also so so chill. The driving is just challenging enough to keep you engaged but there aren't really any consequences for failure. The major issue is that the game just kinda… ends? All the elements for a really interesting game are there but it feels like they just ran out of time. Definitely worth checking out but not a hidden indie masterpiece or anything

Do yourself a favor and play it. Then go play Echo Generation 1. Then go play Ravenlok. Cococucumber does more with voxel visuals than most AAA games do with hyper realism.

9PDKDBQGG2N2.title: Interesting but.....

Its weirdly addictive and satisfying at the same time the egg jumping mechanic is just a fun time after you get used to it. it'll take you 15-25 hours to complete without check points. Id say set your expectations it is a rage inducing game for sure, but take things slow and dont beat yourself up to much. I actually kind of wish this game had more of story to it! Overall 4/5 experience, PC performance is pretty good a bit demanding though.

9PDKDBQGG2N2.title: Challenging physics game
9PDKDBQGG2N2.text: It's a bummer there are so many bad reviews. The game is what it is. It is a very simple premise; you are an egg ascending the coop to heaven. The game is all about timing and physics. It is frustratingly difficult, but what's the alternative? I don't think it would be better if it wasn't hard. Also, the Dutch dude narrating is insane. he adds a lot to a cute little parkour game. This game has a strange vibe that I find entertaining.

9PDKDBQGG2N2.title: Absolute blast
9PDKDBQGG2N2.text: If you love challenging games, this is for you. Great visuals and physics. Frustrating, but that is why I play these games.

9PDKDBQGG2N2.title: Great for fans of "impossible" games

C3LW50BQJ878.title: Blown Away
C3LW50BQJ878.text: This hasn't shouldn't exist An entire open world space sim on a console, and it's just mind blowing The mechanics are insanely complex but infinitely accessible (figuring it out on your own is my favorite part!) It's as relaxing as you want it to be, and just feels AMAZING. It is possible that all the activities will get old eventually (though the constantly changing galaxy means it's not likely) but not before you've drained every single cent worth out of the title and then some. Can't believe I waited so long to play this. For Scifi fans, this is your holy grail Get it Now.

C3LW50BQJ878.title: Better than Star Citizen
C3LW50BQJ878.text: Updated: Still better than SC. Space Legs coming soon. Join us, or perish in the void. Eve Offline.

C3LW50BQJ878.title: ...but play at least some of the tutorials!
C3LW50BQJ878.text: After playing for almost 500 hours, this game still draws me back to it. That's a 5 star review right there. This game inspires so much of the imagination. Its primary flaw, if it is indeed a flaw, is that it requires your imagination. It doesn't guide you a whole lot. The story is overarching and not readily apparent to new players. It's not so much a story as a world where stuff is going on and you can find a way to be a part of it, or just keep to yourself and do your own thing. The biggest advice I can give is to play the tutorials that teach you flight controls, navigation and docking.…

C3LW50BQJ878.title: The final frontier...
C3LW50BQJ878.text: This game is a masterpiece. Be warned though, the game is hardcore and you'll get from it whatever you put into it. If you're willing to learn about the intricacies of running a realistic spaceship, you'll be rewarded with amazing gameplay and limitless adventure. The learning curve is steep but this game is basically a dream come true for people like me. You can fight, hunt bounties, peacefully trade and haul goods between systems, mine resources, or become a pirate. It's all there if you're willing to put the time in. Absolutely brilliant game with top notch graphics, design, and sound.

9NNKJNRKFT0G.title: Me: I wanna play Zelda!

It controls well, the weapon and armor upgrade system is fun to play around with, and the fights against the giant enemies are really quite fun, especially figuring out how to extract strands from them to upgrade your magic spells. Combat feels a lot of fun, tough the controls took me a bit of getting used to. They sit somewhere between a classic action RPG and a Soulslike, so I keep accidentally hitting the wrong button to attack. Not a big deal,…

9P1JS86M9SXH.title: Game works.

9P1JS86M9SXH.title: Use Task Manager if Game is closing on you.

9NBZ9JF6TFMD.title: How to fix game
9NBZ9JF6TFMD.text: Hear me out I tried all kinds of different things to get this game to run for days. noticed that it was not picking up my GPU but instead the CPU integrated graphics. go into your NVIDIA control panel, manage 3D settings, and change global settings from auto select to your GPU. now launch the game and your GPU should now be listed. close game and now go to Graphics settings under the Display settings tab, change desktop app tp Microsoft store app, the select fallout, now change to high performance and you will be all good to go now. you can also go back to the NVIDIA control panel and change…

9NBZ9JF6TFMD.title: A fix for PC players
9NBZ9JF6TFMD.text: 1:Go into your nvidia settings/Control Pannal or AMD settings 2: Select manage 3D settings (don't know about AMD but this should also apply) 3: select the add button and add fallout 3 GOTY 4: look below and select high performance 5: When the game launcher appears go into settings and switch your intel graphics or other to nvidia or other (should apply with AMD cards as well) THIS WILL FIX IT. 6:Enjoy the game! 7: If this did not work then your outta luck

9NBZ9JF6TFMD.title: Fantastic game, worth a playthrough. ONE TIP THOUGH
9NBZ9JF6TFMD.text: The install size is HUGE because several copies of the game are included in different languages. Once it's installed, enable mods in the xbox app, open the mods folder and you can delete all the languages you don't need. It will shrink the install size down to around 9 gigs. You don't have to do any actual modding unless you want to and it won't effect the game if you don't need the other languages. Also, the game ran flawlessly for me out of the box (Latest Windows update, Nvidia 1060, Ryzen 3700X). If you can't get it to run for some reason, google Tale of Two Wastelands follow a setup…

9NBZ9JF6TFMD.title: Game fix found!!!
9NBZ9JF6TFMD.text: If you're like me and LOVE Fallout, but you're really disappointed that this game wont run, follow these steps! -Open Nvidia control panel (Right click desktop, show more if on win11, nvidia control panel) -Manage 3D settings>preferred graphics processor>choose your graphics card -Launch display settings>switch from desktop app to Microsoft app>select Fallout 3 GOAT>set it to high performance Launch the game and it will identify your graphics card, then set all the graphics settings to ULTRA. This is the only known fix

C3KLDKZBHNCZ.title: HOW TO FIX DLC!!!!!!
C3KLDKZBHNCZ.text: Right click on the game, go to manage, go to files, then click browse. This will take you to the files on your PC. Find your fallout 4 folder, you should see each dlc you own below the main game. Next, double click on the dlc folder, you should see a content folder, double click this as well. You will see a data folder and files underneath it, double click the data folder, this is where you will see the dlc files, THIS IS IMPORTANT, copy all files and CUT them out, do not copy and paste, you must cut them from the folder. Next, use the back arrow in the top left to go back to the main file…

9NKGNMNK3K3Z.title: Not Quite Fallout 4 Multiplayer, but close enough.
9NKGNMNK3K3Z.text: I got this game right before NPC's were added in and it was extremely lacking, but after several updates it has become an amazing game... unless you are a whiny brat. You will see a lot of those in these reviews. People crying and complaining about the game that they are still playing. "Oh its a terrible game and I don't like this and I hate that, but I still play it everyday." ridiculous. Don't listen to the complainers, try it for yourself and appreciate all of the hard work the people at Bethesda put into this. They did a great job! Sidenote: See those thumbs down ratings my review got?…

9NKGNMNK3K3Z.title: That's a comeback!
9NKGNMNK3K3Z.text: Being a huge Fallout fan, and to this day still playing Fallout 4 for another run through, I definitely got this game when it first came out. It was heartbreaking to think that they promised such a great experience at launch and it was a huge flop. But, they have put a lot of work into this game. Fixing some (not all) bugs, adding free DLC content to expand and extend the game, and adding features to make it feel like a real evolved Fallout experience. Don't let reviews of a game that was terrible at launch deter you from giving it a try, either finally or once again! See you in the Wasteland!

9NKGNMNK3K3Z.title: Guide to run it on PC
9NKGNMNK3K3Z.text: First, Click the 3 dots in the game directory, Select "Allow Mods" Then find in your Program files in the installed drive "ModifiableWindowsApps" In here find the Project76.ini in your desired language, Copy this, Find the Fallout76 folder in your My Games you should see a "Project76Pref.ini" this is where you place it, Now, Rename your Project76.ini to Project76Custom.ini this allows the game to ignore the basic one (which the game constantly deletes) and read your Custom, Which should make it work through the region not found error, If you can't get that far, Make sure if you use windows…

BS6WJ2L56B10.title: Truly Underrated Title
BS6WJ2L56B10.text: Great game and tons of fun. It unfortunately had a rough launch and was not only tainted by bugs but unfair (sometimes plain false) and relentless media scrutiny as well. The game is about as buggy as any other Bethesda title at this point, but it has not taken away from my experience at all. 500 hours in, I've been playing on one character since BETA and 20+ of those hours have been with a character that I just started for Wastelanders. I had fun with the base game, but Wastelanders has taken it to the next level, forwarding the main story, while also reshaping the entire Appalachian…

BS6WJ2L56B10.title: Great game! Longtime Fallout fan here. Can't get enough
BS6WJ2L56B10.text: Awesome game.. It plays like Fallout 4, but with some added features. Has some bugs that will get fixed, but people are very very impatient. A lot of fun, and can't get enough exploration. PVP is partially there, but you rarely come in contact with others. This is not a hardcore survival game like RUST or ARK, which is a huge positive for me! Takes some work, strategy, and restraint to not fill the stash weight limit, but Bethesda says they are looking into it.

BS6WJ2L56B10.title: I dig it.
BS6WJ2L56B10.text: Have been playing since Beta, and the game has continually evolved in the right direction and been enjoyable overall. Didn't know if I'd actually care to have more NPCs, but now that they're here, it's a plus (Mort, the ghoul at Wayward is personal favorite).

9MZR11JRF7BX.title: FOR ANYONE WHO CAN'T GET MODS TO WORK!
9MZR11JRF7BX.text: Fallout: New Vegas has a different way to get mods than Skyrim and Fallout 4 does. Go to a website called nexus and install NEXUS MOD MANAGER, let it install, and let it search for FNV. Once NMM has found FNV, go back to Nexus and find the mods you want. Select the option called "Download through Vortex", chose whether you would like slow download or fast download(fast download requires Nexus Premium) and wait for the 5 seconds. Repeat this process with the mods you want. Beware that some mods need to be installed manually, most of which have guides to do so, and some mods depend on other…

But the question still stands: is this a game I should download and play? The answer: of course, this game will make you want to leap for joy. I highly recommend this game. BR7X7MVBBQKM.title: Don’t listen to the haters
BR7X7MVBBQKM.text: Those that hate on this game are just resistant to change. Having played FC 3-5 I can say this is the best one so far. Most of the complaints are about “forced progression”. Yes, at certain points in the game it does pull you in to main story missions, but it is not a bad thing. 1) logically this makes sense with the story. If you make enough trouble, don’t you think the bad guys would want to bring you in? 2) This makes sure you are not too OP when you take on these missions. You can’t just dink around and hit the max level before facing the main bad guys, which makes the game a little more…

BR7X7MVBBQKM.title: Be free of your sins!

Yes, I’m biased as a fan of the series, but 4 really delivers. Sure, there are some oddities, the repetition of the radio broadcast and a few of the missions are head-scratchers, but Ubi knocked it out of the park with this one.

Considering its 40$, I'd say all you crybabies who are complaining should spend the extra money and buy a full game like Metro or Fallout. Otherwise take it for what it is. This game is great and theres plenty of stuff to do as long as you dont rush through it.

9PM709J61828.title: Mod Tips
9PM709J61828.text: Quick PSA on how to install a mod on this version no worries if you already bought it or use Game Pass. First, the mod folder won’t be there until the game creates it. The best way I found to trigger that is by launching the game, go to the internal mod browser, and install one mod from there. After that, you’re free to grab mods from anywhere. The mod folder will be located at: \Users\(yourusername)\AppData\Local\Packages\GIANTSSoftware.FarmingSimulator25PC\LocalCache\Local\mods Not in the XboxGames folder. Note that the AppData folder is hidden by default in Windows. To make it visible, go…

9PDCN8Z4HKRN.title: Fun but could use chat
9PDCN8Z4HKRN.text: Disregard players who said levels are too short: you can set how long and how difficult you want a job to be. Learning how to use your tools/weapons takes a bit of time as they are incredibly synergistic, and the enemies - while comical - can be deadly at higher levels (or just get downed by sticky notes repeatedly!). But: no voice chat definitely impacts coordination and possibly fun. It is worth picking up, learning how to play (this takes some time!), and grouping up with other players who are up for the fun. I'm not sure randoms are the best way to play the game.

9PDCN8Z4HKRN.title: Ambitiously Fun, yet Short
9PDCN8Z4HKRN.text: FBC: Firebreak takes what I like about the Control universe, amplifies it with haphazard style, and pushes it out towards familiar maps and enemies with a nice, yet short set of missions, classes, and weaponry. The game does need more content (a least more maps for each job or 3-4 more jobs) and the variety isn't anything to write home about but the need for teamwork, the thrill of overcoming odds with your tech and movement (mainly a Jump Kit main), and the modifiers makes for a thrilling experience that only makes me wish there was more to enjoy than what we got here on launch. Sprinkle it…
