9P20JCF7BV93.title: Great relaxing Old School Fantasy Game!
9P20JCF7BV93.text: Relaxing old school game to play and relax. Have been putting off Final Fantasy games for years now. What better way of starting than FF1. Great game to play and relax. Pros: Easy to pick up and play, no large learning curve. Cons: No quest log and sometimes easy to forget who gets what on key items. Old school graphics. If you don't like older graphic games this is not the game for you. Tips: Keep your own quest log, the game does not have one. Save often and defiantly prior to entering a dungeon. If you are not strong enough to complete dungeon just do some more grinding and try again.…

9P20JCF7BV93.title: Worth Seeing
9P20JCF7BV93.text: Pixel Remaster graphics do a good job at keeping the spirit of the original. They made leveling faster and you can save anywhere which takes much of the punishing difficulty away. I enjoyed it as a quick nostalgia trip, having played the original.

9P8S1MN4066K.title: Great turn based RPG!
9P8S1MN4066K.text: Definitely some improvements from FF1. First of all instead of throwing a handful of different quests at you all at once and then trying to remember where they all go, they stuck to one quest at a time bringing you through the story line. Great story line by the way. They did change the leveling system in this game. Instead of leveling your characters you now were improving/leveling their skills with a weapon group and individual spells. Some people did not like this I am sure and some did. At first I hated it but it grew on me as time went on. It reminded me of Ultima Online back in the day.…

9P8S1MN4066K.title: Fantastic Follow Up
9P8S1MN4066K.text: This game is a great follow-up to an already amazing first entry in the series. It took until FF4 for the narrative to really take off, so don't expect anything too amazing in that regard, but the QOL and mechanic changes/improvements they made in FF2 are awesome. If Achievements are what you're after, they're fairly easy and make the game a bit more enjoyable in my opinion. Overall worth the buy.

9P8S1MN4066K.title: A great installment
9P8S1MN4066K.text: This series is long running for a reason. This is a part of its foundation.

9P8S1MN4066K.title: A redo of a classic.
9P8S1MN4066K.text: Just getting this out of the way: This is NOT a port of the any other release of Final Fantasy 2 that came after its original release(Origins, Dawn Of Souls, PSP's Arcane Labyrinth, etc). This is a full redo of the original NES release with the only changes being artwork, sprite work and magic animations. The story for FF2 is honestly the more serious of the original NES trio. With whole towns being wiped out and the empire massacring its way across the world. The leveling system in FF2 is unlike any other release even today. You get stronger by simplying acting in battle - strike an enemy…

9NWDPFPPK30V.title: Another Great Entry
9NWDPFPPK30V.text: FF3 has that great late 80's JRPG vibe that carried the series for a long time. The story is fairly similar to the first two with the 4 chosen but is definitely worth a playthrough. They went back to the leveling system of the first game which I appreciated, while making some other QOL changes that are well received in my opinion. Overall worth a buy/play.

9NWDPFPPK30V.title: BEST GAME EVA!!!
9NWDPFPPK30V.text: i have never played a game netter then this, outta the way Minecraft!!!

9NWDPFPPK30V.title: Solid, MUCH better than FF2

9N8C07SS8C9D.title: BEST PIXEL JRPG
9N8C07SS8C9D.text: They really knocked it out of the park with this one. After 100%'ing the first 3 FF's I moved on to #4 and was not disappointed. They introduced named main characters and gave a lot of background and character development throughout the game. Easily the best in the series so far. Lots to explore, and a lot of challenging side bosses with great rewards. Absolutely recommend a buy/playthrough.

9N9C8SV0S16W.title: cant wait for VI to be added

9N255K81XBD3.title: Phenomenal boost to a classic

9N255K81XBD3.title: A Beautiful RPG!!!!
9N255K81XBD3.text: What more do i need to say ... The best Final Fantasy of all time !!!!

9N255K81XBD3.title: A surprisingly good JRPG
9N255K81XBD3.text: Forget having never played a Final Fantasy game, and forget a low-rez 32bit pixel graphic visual style. FF6 actually rules. Story has solid characters; it's lighthearted, it's intense, it can actually make you feel so much, and it's surprisingly intuitive and has a deeper depth of gameplay mechanics, combat, and optional side content. It's a smaller scope on a large JRPG, and is worth picking up if you've never played any FF games or any of the originals, or just want a good JRPG.

9N255K81XBD3.title: The Best Final Fantasy
9N255K81XBD3.text: I wish I could give the game more stars. A few visual changes from what you might remember on the SNES and some U.I. differences that put it in line with the other 5 titles in the Pixel Remaster collection but the quality of life features make this the best way to experience this game today.

BQQKG9H2STC0.title: This is to remind myself to play again
BQQKG9H2STC0.text: I expected a game where I was going to just put out fires and watch them. I got something better and I don't think I'll ever forget it.

9NBLGGH4PBBM.title: Best Gears Experience
9NBLGGH4PBBM.text: I'm extremely shocked by how amazing this sequel was. This is the best PC experience I have ever faced in a game before, it can only be better with custom user maps, but regardless the PC version is flawless. There are tons of different video options and with a GTX 1070 on Ultra, I can reach 144fps (are you kidding, this is Black Ops 3 level fps with much more eye candy). I haven't tried horde mode, but I love the campaign and enjoy the multiplayer. This game easily will last me over 150 hours of content and with new maps still coming. The Coalition really know how to treat their fans.

Lots of customization for your Gears and upgrades to get too, such as weapon mods and armor pieces to find in the field.

Basic features are missing (weapon desc showing usable ammo type, ability to toggle off in-game voice in multiplayer, push to talk, preventing players recycling equipped weapons, crafting was rushed). A few QOL would vastly improve things. Combat is hard as heck, but generally satisfying, even when overwhelmed. Graphics? Generally amazing, but there can be so much bloom at night it's REALLY hard…

9MWGGC7JH35B.title: Style over substance; but man, what a style.
9MWGGC7JH35B.text: Artistically brilliant, Genesis Noir balances great visuals and sounds in a way that allows the player to indulge in it's heady message without becoming overwhelmed. In terms of the narrative however, it's told in such an abstract way that it's easy to lose track of what is being said. Gameplay likewise leaves a fair amount to be desired, with set pieces often feeling too long and too monotonous. Overall, Genesis Noir is absolutely worth a look. But if you don't find yourself enjoying its presentation, the storytelling and gameplay are unlikely to keep you invested.

9MWGGC7JH35B.title: Point-and-click game with great visuals and music
9MWGGC7JH35B.text: Genesis Noir is great with its presentation but unless you're into this type of games, gameplay could feel lacking. One should keep in mind that Genesis Noir seems to put more into its presentation and story than gameplay.

9PF2ZS4XB4JH.title: Worth a Try for a Free Football Game
9PF2ZS4XB4JH.text: The game is completely free and only around 3 GB in size, which is smaller than many mobile games these days. Considering that it's a PC game, that's pretty impressive. If you're a football fan, I'd say it's worth trying. However, the gameplay is nowhere near the level of FC or eFootball. There are also some noticeable issues, especially with passing and shooting, which can feel unreliable at times. Overall, it's a decent free-to-play football game with potential. Hopefully, future updates will improve the gameplay and fix some of the current problems.

9MVK5W0HMRP7.title: This Game Changed My Life.
9MVK5W0HMRP7.text: Let's talk. My life was in shambles. I had no purpose in life, and I hated everything. Until I found Golf With Your Friends. This game is legendary and quite literally changed my life. They took all of my data, and in exchange gave me everything. I had golf, I had friends, I had it all. My depression slowly left me, and I began seeing the world for what it was. Amazing. The world is an oyster, and the pearl inside of that oyster is Golf With Your Friends. I give it a Golf/10 and my prestigious Golden Sirloin Award.

9N36BLQF3FX6.title: Unique and uplifting.

I hope the developers enjoyed making this game and can continue to make fun games with each other.

9N36BLQF3FX6.title: Wonderfully weird
9N36BLQF3FX6.text: I love the vibrancy of each character and their designs. I'm incredibly surprised that people aren't rallying in the reviews screaming stuff about woke games and dei and all that. Anyways, this game is weird, cringe, yet hides a level of deepness and darkness behind that weirdness and humor. If you enjoy weirdcore and the aforementioned aspects, as well as a fairly short game that you could possibly finish in one day, then you may enjoy this game! The puzzles aren't too difficult, and throwing words and objects at people makes it feel less tedious and more fun

9PC288TN7R8K.title: Solid, yet still questionably a 'remaster'
9PC288TN7R8K.text: When I personally first went into the game, I had expected to, well, see that the game has a complete overhaul in lightning, textures, and models like the description implies. But, this is not precisely the case. The lightning and models of the characters have improved, but nothing else. It's still the same thing from some years ago, with a few improved character models. Overall, it's still Grim Fandango, which means it's still the fun little adventure game that became beloved all those years ago. Still, it is an improvement, given achievement support, and the more optimized standard that…

9PJTHRNVH62H.title: Me and My Brother
9PJTHRNVH62H.text: We planned to play this game when it came out, he told me about it back in March of this year. He was excited for the concept and we are both fans of the devs since NV so we were anticipating the drop. It was honestly the last plans we had together before he passed away in April. So playing it has been a great pleasure I wish I could have shared, but regardless the game is living up to our expectations quite well. It's got a decent amount of content where it stands now and being in early access with devs like these, I am expecting nothing short of a fantastic product by the end of things.

9PJTHRNVH62H.title: So many bugs!

9PJTHRNVH62H.title: Great survival game. Surprisingly good story!
9PJTHRNVH62H.text: I came here expecting an OK survival game to play solo for a few hours to scratch that itch. What I ended up finding was a very good survival game with an unexpected good and interesting story to tell. I never got to play it multiplayer, but I have to guess that would be a lot of fun as well. Word of advice though, the regular difficulty is definitely more geared towards a team-focused approach at playing the game. If you are going to play this solo then go for Mild difficulty, as it makes it feel more like a regular single player game. It's still not a cakewalk but definitely less punishing…

I know its probably a lot of work, but idk maybe at some point can we think about expanding the amount of people that can join, while I know this can mess with the stories direction, I do feel like its something worth exploring.. 9P77PG7DK0W2.title: Give it time players. Gawsh
9P77PG7DK0W2.text: Let's go ahead and get this over with. Yes, it has issues, bugs, lags some time and will crash in mp a few times here and there. All that aside, I have enjoyed absolutely every second of this game. From the mid jump lag freezes to the backpack falling to oblivion, unable to physically retrieve. Everyone that is giving this game a harsh review or a low rating should understand, the first Grounded was equally as buggy. Give the devs some credit and time for their teams to work out all the bad. Huge fan for life here Obsidian. Keep up the good work. Cannot wait to see what drops next. I will say…

9P77PG7DK0W2.title: It's an expansion of the first
9P77PG7DK0W2.text: First, I should state for people giving it a low score for being unoptimized, etc: It's pre-release. You're basically beta testing it. Betas have bugs (pun intended). As a sequel for Grounded, so far it's amazing. I like the difficulty hike and the reworked combat system. While I miss my dagger and shield DOT build, I feel like the challenge of making class-specific builds makes it better and more fun. The inventory gui feels like it was a modernization to match the in game time period and I love the more techno-80s feel of it. And I also love that the SCA.B mk 2 is based off the Power Glove.

9P8DL6W0JBB8.title: Possibly the best roguelike EVER (so far)
9P8DL6W0JBB8.text: Roguelikes are great, the fast but slow burn of progression, the variety, the rush of hitting marks whether dodging or attacking JUST right. But eventually those "fighting elements" wane and stagnate. Well that's where Hades has you covered. Not only is the "fighting" roguelike and a slow but constant build, SO IS THE STORY. And it's a good one. Plenty of variety, humor, and realness. There were times when I was tired of "the grind" but I wanted to progress the story. And then the game play reignited and I was hooked all over again. It's one of the few games I have actually finished all the…

9NBLGGH515BD.title: Underrated: Make HW2 Great Again
9NBLGGH515BD.text: Microsoft and 343 should be ashamed of themselves for allowing this game to drift into nothingness. It needs updates, a lower price, and to be brought to Steam to increase the player base. A little polish and advertising would do wonders to help this game live on. A criminally underrated and accessible RTS that fits exceptionally well within the incredible Halo universe. Don't let this gem pass you by. MAKE HALO WARS 2 GREAT AGAIN.

9NBLGGH515BD.title: So much to enjoy about this game
9NBLGGH515BD.text: As this game follows Halo 5 in the Halo timeline, I chose to play this after completing Guardians. Without a doubt, I enjoyed this game more. While the storyline is your typical "fight for survival on an alien planet" that's so common in Halo, the execution is what makes it so memorable. Great cinematics, likeable characters, fantastic music, and a campaign that takes just the right amount of time to beat. It handles just like any RTS out there, so those familiar with the genre will feel right at home. Definitely a game I'd recommend.

9MT8PTGVHX2P.title: Freeze Fix
9MT8PTGVHX2P.text: There is a fairly simple fix to the loading screen freezing. Just go to my games and apps, from there find the master chief collection and press the menu button. Select the manage tab and from there scroll down to the very button option titled saved data. Delete your personal accounts saved data and the problem should be fixed. You're welcome! If anyone has questions feel free to message me :)

9PMBB7NGHV95.title: Emotionally chilling and artistically poetic
9PMBB7NGHV95.text: I have not completed the game yet, but after passing the first giant (which was an amazing and unparalleled experience, yet sad) I realized that this isn't a game that I should try to play through in one day.

9PMBB7NGHV95.title: A brilliant, immersive piece of storytelling
9PMBB7NGHV95.text: If this game is a "walking simulator" then it's a walk across a tightrope over an active volcano. Ninja Theory pushes the medium further than nearly any other game studio, exploring mental health and Norse mythology in brilliant and innovative ways. If you're expecting Stellar Blade or Elden Ring, you won't find it here, and that's why it's good. What you will find - if you indeed allow yourself to become immersed - is a cinematic dark fantasy story with striking visuals and gameplay that, in the best of moments, will leave your palms sweaty and heart pounding.

9NCLP4LV5K7Z.title: Worthwhile, If You're Patient
9NCLP4LV5K7Z.text: A compelling and unique game. The combat is satisfying though basic, the acting excellent, the atmosphere chilling, and the audio is fantastic. I wish I could give it 5 stars, but the puzzles hold the game back. They are atrocious and do more to halt the momentum of the game than to create variety. They are rudimentary and straightforward, but the controls for solving them are very finicky, resulting in the player wrestling with how to input the solution rather than how to discover it. If you can be patient through that tedium, the rest is well worth it.

I mean your on game pass just try it give it at least till the first boss fight before you quit it really is a good game.

The atmosphere and story are like nothing I've ever seen before. It blows any modern AAA game out of the water, I can't believe this game has never gotten the recognition it deserves, heck it took me until 2020 to find what I without a doubt the best game I've ever played. If you have any doubts, toss them aside, you will not regret…

9N8FQ28Z6QX3.title: Incredible game and faithful to the franchise.
9N8FQ28Z6QX3.text: This is the best thing to come out of the Indiana Jones franchise since the original movies. The gameplay, the writing, the acting - it's all top notch. The cutscenes are so well directed it makes me feel like Indy is young again - the voice actor for Indy sounds exactly like him. If you have even the slightest hint of nostalgia for Indiana Jones, this is a MUST PLAY - but even if you've never watched any of the movies, this is an incredibly fun game. Full marks from me, and in my GOTY discussions for sure.

9N8FQ28Z6QX3.title: Feels exactly like an Indiana Jones game should.

I love collectibles, and this game has them everywhere. The game has two different difficulty settings for combat and exploration. The hardest difficulty for combat is unforgiving, you will probably die if you accidentally alert a camp of bad guys, but the combat still feels fair, and there are ways to deal with 5+ guys if you're smart about it. The game gives you a gun fairly early on, but the melee combat is pretty satisfying if you can get…

9NVV0M74W05C.title: Thoughtful and well-paced game

You experience the 90's Japanese konbini through the week-long employment of Makoto, a college student trying to help out her aunt by running the night shift. Every decision has some felt consequences by the same returning customers and vendors. But you aren't superhuman. Makoto learns during this time, that (1) life is fleeting (2) perfection is impossible (3) relationships are everything. There's a system where you can ask the…

I was looking forward to these costumers coming in and hearing about their day, somehow it was kicking that side of me that's antisocial. It has me yearning to connect with people when usually I'm in a rush to get away from everyone. I think this is the perfect cozy game this year, especially when you're going through a rough time, it…

9NM4WQ7TTH3J.title: I Built the Perfect Bug Team… Then It Was Over
9NM4WQ7TTH3J.text: I started as a normal bug catcher using beetles. First match—easy. Baby game.Second match, I lose. Time to lock in. I start catching everything. Save every bug. Eventually win the first tournament and reach the lake, where everything changes: bees. Insane synergy, NRG for days. Anything without a star stat? Gone. Until I lose to some 8-year-old. Fine. I like you can play both versions of the arcade game. Personally I'm more into the classic version. From this point what so many already said about Killer Instinct, I would heavily agree with. BNBWFH89FCF1.title: Not for Everyone

The combat is sparse and realistic. There is no magic and the fast travel is more like quick travel. That being said, the realism is insanely fun to me. I mean, I have to go learn to read. I fell off a scaffolding from like 7 feet up and broke both feet which eventually started bleeding because I neglected them and I bled out. While fast traveling, I found a dead woman but was able to hunt down and kill her murderer. If all…

BNBWFH89FCF1.title: Give this one a try...seriously.
BNBWFH89FCF1.text: Really fun game. I understand it was buggy at launch, but I haven’t run into anything outside of minor graphical stuff. Even that is few and far in between. I recommend this to anyone that loves a great ROG experience. The lack of “magic” and fantasy is made up with a realistic approach to things and the wide variety skills. You can even get better at drinking! The quests and stories are engaging and varied. My only complaint is lockpicking is hard to understand without looking up a video. Do yourself a favor and turn lockpicking to simple in the menu

BNBWFH89FCF1.title: Nothing but LOVE
BNBWFH89FCF1.text: This game reminds me of Skyrim and For Honor, but basically they had a baby. There isn't magic or dragons, but you get immersed in the historical story line - because its that damn good. You suck at everything in the beginning, but the game is designed to get yourself trained up however you want. It has been a long time since anyone has gotten a game right and Warhorse did it here. If you appreciate single player RPGs, with a lot of historical truths, and the cinematics to back it - this game is for you. Many laughs and good frustrations, first boss is fun? (Lol) I purchased the DLCs on...…

BNBWFH89FCF1.title: AMAZING GAME
BNBWFH89FCF1.text: This is a really fun game. I have over 50 hours into it and I find myself sitting down and playing this game for hours and not noticing how much time I have spent. Even the grinding in this game does not get boring. Only down side is that the fighting system is hard to learn but once you get the handle of it you can make it through but you can cheese groups of enemies like other rpg mideval style games (Skyrim). The graphic in it are great and I am not even playing on an Xbox One X which makes me think that if you play on one of those it would be even better.

Well put together. The tutorials won't lead you through every aspect, but you can easily pick it up along the way. Quite a bit of fun. The gold coins are the fundament. They are how you progress. Spend your coins concentrically starting from the center. Ultimately your objective on each landscape is to push both the left and right side to the "monster portal"(These spawn monsters every night) which you have to conquer with military units using gold. On the whole: nothing wrong with the game. It's a good bit of fun and works well. The only real issue is the lack of direct explanation as to…

9NVRJS95FLM9.title: とても面白い……が、画面酔いが激しい
9NVRJS95FLM9.text: まず開始時点で世界観に興味を持ち、惹かれました。 キャラクターの見た目も世界観と合っています。 ゲームの３大要素と言われる「運」がメインのストーリーなのもあり、とても分かりやすく、まだ序盤ですが今後の展開がとても楽しみです。 しかし……。 開始してから私はワクワクしてコントローラーを握っていましたが、段々と気持ちが悪くなってきてしまいました。 私はよっぽどでは無い限り酔わないので、自分でも困惑しつつ、しかし気持ちが悪いのはどうしようもないので、休憩を挟みつつプレイすることにしました。 それでも視点の角度の自動調整、画面の揺れ方故に、吐き気が次第に強くなってしまいました。 今後もぜひプレイしたいゲームではありますが、プレイする際は酔い止め、そして高頻度の休憩が必須でしょう。 酔いやすい方はご注意を！

This game is also a love letter to the 90s, and had me feeling some strong nostalgia. From movie rentals, to Discman players, to the camcorder that plays a central part in the game, it all feels right, But even all of that pales to the music and sound design. 9N79TQTZTQQ4.title: Fix broken achievements
9N79TQTZTQQ4.text: Seems like MSFT bungled achievements, and didn't have them go live until the following day. If you played on launch before achievements were "added", any you would have unlocked like "complete the prologue" won't on subsequent replays because your save file has already met that criteria. A fix: 1. Quit the game. Press start on the game icon and select manage game and add-ons. 2. Delete your local save data for that game. 3. Go offline (somewhere in settings). 4. Launch the game with your account offline. 5. Accept the EULA and start a new game at the prologue. 6. Once the prologue starts.…

Before I play this game, I end the take on the BACKGROUND PROCESS Medieval Dynasty, wait about 10 seconds and start the game from Game Pass. 9N5PKH0KW2L1.title: Zelda Bullet Hell
9N5PKH0KW2L1.text: I played this on Steam, it is so much fun and reminds me of the first time I played a Zelda game. The map is big enough to encourage exploring, but not big enough to be overwhelming. The upgrades are placed nearly perfectly, the game gets harder as you get better and get upgrades. The challenges are hard, but fun and fair. The bullet hell is tough, but fair, and the controls are super responsive; any time I was hit, I thought "that was my fault". Play this game here, buy it on Steam, send the developer a venmo, encourage them to make more like this.

9N5PKH0KW2L1.title: Top tier indie with a strong nostalgic feel.

It may sound like an odd mashup, but makes for an extremely fun and satisfying experience. I've owned the game on Steam for quite some time now and have already completed 2 full playthroughs, the 2nd of which was streamed on Twitch with a very positive reception from the viewers. This game is a true gem that should not be overlooked!

9NP86K57SQM3.title: More Than the Sum of its Parts
9NP86K57SQM3.text: This game does a lot of things right, but what would otherwise be a fun but unremarkable collection of gameplay elements are all brought together and elevated by incredible art and world design and a little sense of playfulness. It's got the most cohesive sense of place that I have seen in one of these modern Metroidvanias, and a compelling history and story to go along with it. It also gives you one of my favorite sets of platforming abilities that I have seen in a while and lets you utilize them in fun and creative ways to overcome its most devious challenges, which I found to be tough but…

Speaking of which, the early bosses are alright and the end game bosses are really fun for me (I beat P5 in HK). I don't do speedrunner shenanigans most of the time but I think I've reached areas I wasn't supposed to, using my abilities in weird ways. I honestly love the platforming and it's probably the best I've ever seen. Overall a solid metroidvania.

9NDJX252Q5BW.title: I never had any bugs, game is just *more* Moonlighter 1
9NDJX252Q5BW.text: Absolute masterpiece of a game. If you liked Moonlighter 1, you will enjoy this sequel. They streamlined the dungeon room process so it's more like Slay the Spire, where you select which path you want to choose as you progress toward the boss at the end. The actual process of clearing rooms is basically the same as it's always been: kill everything and the doors unlock. The shop mechanics are still great, very similar to 1, the story is surprisingly engaging, and the combat is very satisfying. The game is technically in early access, but I literally had no idea until I beat the available…

BXVCFBJBNS17.title: The Finest in The Elder Scrolls Series
BXVCFBJBNS17.text: This is definitively the best way to play the greatest title in the renowned Elder Scrolls franchise. With both 4K and gamepad support now available, Morrowind's already engrossing world is more accessible, more comfortable, and brought to life in sharper focus than ever before. As old as the game may be, it remains a system seller, and is the primary reason I purchased my Xbox One X. Those raised on Skyrim or Oblivion may decry the lack of convenience features in Morrowind, but the cost of those features was steep: Immersion. No other first-person RPG has ever felt so alien, so engrossing,…

BXVCFBJBNS17.title: One of the true classics!

The police of course will beat you down mercilessly and rob you. Customization is top notch. Traffic looks better as do surroundings. You actually have to buy the faster cars they aren't given to you so often that you don't care anymore. The game does a…

Playing online with friends especially in a crew whether racing or just bothering the cops is so much fun. Give this game a chance if you value features such as police more than graphics and the number of cars. Although this should have been…

BRZZLBF5T245.title: It’s really not as bad as the reviews
BRZZLBF5T245.text: This game was almost a lost cause in the first hour of playing it, I found that the car handling was horrendous and the cops were a little OP even on easy. By the second day of not giving up, the game became easier as the cars upgraded handling and power, I finally understood the drift dynamics and the games physics. Sure it’s not Forza or Assetto Corsa, but it’s a dang good game for encapsulating street scene car culture and customization further than similar racing titles. I do have history playing Need For Speed 2015 and both that one and this one are thoroughly enjoyable. I have yet to…

C355T88BBX1S.title: The Pros & Cons, unfortunately...

The only ones that…

Peak jiggle physics, blood and dismemberment is back! There are some minor hiccups in performance, mostly during the cutscenes and some occasional brief moments of stutter, but honestly its not bad. People are so dramatic. I'm sure they'll iron out these minor flaws. These other people complaining about the…

Typical performance for an UE5 title with Ray Tracing. It does stay true to the original, clunky movement and all. It does however make it more accessible by adding easier difficulty levels. I highly recommend for any fan of…

Near the last couple levels of the game I found myself just running through jumping over enemies to get through the game. Is it Ninja Gaiden? Not really. It's a decent game though. If I could use half stars this would be a 3.5 star game as it is fun at least. It got a 4 from me because I do think others will enjoy it. The music actually reminds me a bit of the Final Fight CD game for Sega CD. I did hear some classic music in there from Ninja Gaiden. One…

9PGFSLP8GWQK.title: Ragebound? Rage quit
9PGFSLP8GWQK.text: The pirate level (about halfway) ended it for me. After 20 times jumping on an extended tentacle over and over across auto-scrolling pits... to just be in a boss battle that also took me about 20 tries... I was no longer filled with satisfaction, just rage and irritation, even after beating the level. So, that's the end for me. A shame, because the control, gorgeous graphics, amazing music, fun story... most of the level design is really clever. But that level, wow. Eff yew, designers. Just not for me, I guess, despite how much I enjoyed aspects of it. Notice I"m still giving it five stars…

9N732VFPMWKT.title: Good
9N732VFPMWKT.text: I can say that I am enjoying this game so far. The 3.6 star rating almost made me not install it and I went in expecting to be disappointed, but I'm glad I did install it. The story seems somewhat lacking but it's alright for me.

BQVQTL3PCH05.title: Definition of late bloomer..
BQVQTL3PCH05.text: You know that girl that was really nice but a bit.. off putting in middle school? Like you totally had a chance but you were dumb and you stood by your unrealistically high standards so you didn't even bother? Then one day.. maybe in high school.. maybe in college.. maybe you just random come across her [Insert random social media] page and you realize that on a scale of 1-10.. she is a 12? Yeah.. this game is that girl. You should have been nicer to her in middle school. Nerd.

BQVQTL3PCH05.title: From launch to current. Dev's Deserve praise.
BQVQTL3PCH05.text: I was following this game since the original reveal trailer. It was promising, and as we all know launch was "rough" But unlike other developers they followed through, and made all the promises they made come true. Then they proceeded to add plenty of things, quite frequently and have never asked for any extra money on top of the base game. This game has so many things to do, and I never get sick of logging on, and exploring new planets, building new bases, finding new and exciting ships, and taking in the stunning visuals. I have game pass, and still purchased this game on multiple consoles.…

BQVQTL3PCH05.title: Dump Starfield and Come Explore Space!
BQVQTL3PCH05.text: I have over 1200+ hours in this game, and it's STILL fun to play and even to start over in a new save. After trying Starfield and wanting SO BADLY to love it, I'm right back here. This is TRUE space exploration, instead of going from menu to box to menu to box like Starfield. The first time you get in your ship and fly seamlessly from a planet's surface, through space, and onto another planet's surface, you will forget Starfield even existed. You. are not. alone.

9NBLGGH1Z6FB.title: Great Experience
9NBLGGH1Z6FB.text: I used a Logitech version of the Xbox controller to play this on my Windows 10 PC, and I have to say the experience was delightful. From a technical standpoint, it was flawless, everything just worked and the gameplay and mechanics were flawless. There was never a time where I thought, "I should be able to do that" and I couldn't. The art was top notch, from the environment and character design all the way through the symbols and animations. The music was a highly worthy compliment to all the other excellent assets, and played a big part in setting the tone. The story was basic but…

9NBLGGH1Z6FB.title: Sets the bar for Metroidvania games
9NBLGGH1Z6FB.text: With the possible exception of simplified (non-targeting) combat, Ori feels like the pinnacle of Metroidvania-genre titles. The graphics are gorgeous, the level design is terrific, the story is engaging. Everyone with a remote interest in platforming games really should give Ori a shot.

9N8CD0XZKLP4.title: Best Game of 2020
9N8CD0XZKLP4.text: It has been a very long time since I've played a game this good. There is not a more gorgeous game in existence, the story is perfect (though sad at times), and the platforming is incredible, it sounds amazing. The game features a nice difficulty curve that builds you up, there is a TON of map to explore, and simple sidequests to keep you engaged. The closest game I've played to this is SteamWorld Dig 2. It's that kind of platformer, you unlock abilities, traverse the world, and admittedly die a lot (but it doesn't penalize you). Combat isn't the main focus, it's either a gateway to slow your…

BW85KQB8Q31M.title: Pure Art

I am an artist and as such was fascinated by the stelar art work and animation from the trailers and gameplays. The brilliant sound design and mixing was just a treat to the ears. Opening with a story sequence to introduce the basic controls of the game the game grips you with heartfelt emotional investment of the world around you. The colors aren't the only thing to shine as the beautiful, ambient music really adds to the charm or tension of each stage. Platforming feels incredible as you…

9PFWZMT737GG.text: this game has SO MUCH POTENTIAL. the concept of living out of a van in a version of the future where nature is triumphant and everything is sustainable hooked me right off the bat, and it's executed beautifully. somehow it's set in the future but still makes me feel nostalgic. being such a new game it does have some flaws, but believe me when i say this could be one of the greatest games of the year once it's a little more polished. the UI can be clunky at times, and it can get annoying driving back and forth across the map to tie up loose ends. with that said, i want nothing more than to see…

9PFWZMT737GG.title: Most nostalgic game I've ever played

Camping out of a car was all of my vacations as a child going from beaches to beautiful forests so playing a game that takes me back to those places brings waves of emotions and nostalgia.

9PGB72NFG5JN.text: It's a great game. Play it with your family and enjoy it for what it is - a great couch co-op title in an era where too few are being made.

BVJLKDG2TX8H.title: Fun and action packed game
BVJLKDG2TX8H.text: This game is one of those rare gems where a simple game that is appropriate for all ages is fun and engaging for everyone. It is a big improvement over the first one (and doesn't require you to have played it). In fact, for people who are new to the game, I would recommend this first since it has more features, especially online coop. I have to admit the first release version has a few achievement tracking bugs, but they don't change the fun and will hopefully get patched soon. I am already waiting for expansions to release because I can't get enough of this game.

BVJLKDG2TX8H.title: Great family couch co-op
BVJLKDG2TX8H.text: Love playing this game with my young kids! One of the best couch co-op games ever!

BVJLKDG2TX8H.title: Loved this game!

My sister and her kids family have a game they play together.

9MT5KSV3RCWD.title: Looking at the game for what it is.
9MT5KSV3RCWD.text: This game has some potential to be a fun city builder with side combat to keep you entertained. Almost gives tower defense vibes, having to protect your town. Right now there is not alot of tutorial help, and there are definitely bugs. There is also like no way of making money or getting food outside of growing crops, which really puts a strangle on your town's happiness and your soldier's pockets. Adding caves, wildlife, fishing, and maybe some other things would greatly improve the experience of the game, and maybe also explain things better, or introduce shops differently for better QOL.…

9MT5KSV3RCWD.title: A fun and casual town builder
9MT5KSV3RCWD.text: Put a couple hours into the game and had a fun time, there is a lot of character in the animations and the movement feels really nice (swimming and dolphin diving is especially fun). There isn't much to do at the moment once you've maxed out the building trees but I'll keep my eye on this one and excited to see how this game continues to develop!

9MT5KSV3RCWD.title: Game is good just needs more optimizations.
9MT5KSV3RCWD.text: So far the gameplay is pretty good for what it is. A bit grindy but with a good town setup you don't need to worry about your townsfolk. However the longer i played the more my game began to lag, this was in single player on the large map so I think that's fair for a new game in EA. People complain about not having character choice but who really cares that much. I play games for the game not for my entitlement, if the game wants me to be a specific character more power to the devs. Nintendo has been doing it for years, accept it or move on.

9MT5KSV3RCWD.title: Great Potential

All around though, far from the worst Early Access/Game Preview game. It has great bones and I look…

C1C4DZJPBC2V.title: ONE OF MY BEST PURCHASES EVER!!!

The verity between characters when it comes to snipers like Hanzo and Widowmaker to up close players like Rienhart, Reaper, and Brigette and even the mid-range players like Solder:76, Tracer and Bastion. Also if you are not very good at the game you can play as someone like Junkrat, a genius who places traps and launches grenades.

You also might use a different hero depending on the map so, for instance, the map Rialto is a sort of zig-zag so I normally choose Junkrat there because his bombs can bounce off walls and maybe give me a ricochet kill and his ULT will be pretty easy to maneuver through the map.…

9PNKG0WBL61W.title: One of a kind
9PNKG0WBL61W.text: First of all, i have over 100 hours of playtime on PS5. This is a survival/roguelike with spooky atmosphere. This game has one of the coolest survival mechanics. Your car is what keeps you alive. its a mobile safe zone. Well.... almost, you have to keep it up and running and the doors intact. Every part of the car adds to its ability to shield you from the hazards in the zone. You start with a simple station wagon and eventually beef it up to a mobile fortress. There are so many awesome upgrades you can customize your car with, spotlights, extra storage, decals and paint. Heck why not add a…

9NKV34XDW014.title: UPDATED... Xbox Made Changes

No crashes on start up, you can name pals, pals now attack anything in your area. As I stated before, this game is beyond addicting. I am almost 400hrs in. People may leave the game because they "cheesed" it. Dont be like them. Honestly, if you are thinking about getting this game, my advice is to run the game on hard. yes you will be killed ALOT. But honestly it makes you play the game as it was intended and 2, not gonna lie, I have gotten some awesome pals at a low level. I got a Suzaku Aqua…

At first its a fun and silly game. Your enjoying catching pals and progressing. Then one day you stop and look at what you have done. Multiple slave camps with innocent pals being forced to work for you. Mining camps, Factories, Farms and breeding camps. Your a monster!

9NKV34XDW014.title: Fix crashing
9NKV34XDW014.text: Turn your world to single player then load into it (it shouldn't crash) then once you've loaded in leave the game (dont exit the entire game) but turn multiplayer back on and you should be able to load back in!

9NKV34XDW014.title: Xbox doesn't allow to play multiplayer with Steam.

Please Xbox and Palworld Dev's fix this problem so all the people who play this game can enjoy it with there friends on Steam and I know that the Dev's can't do anything until Xbox does something.

9PHGK0538TXM.title: MMO HIT
9PHGK0538TXM.text: About a week in, absolutely loving this one. All these clowny 1 star reviews are saying P2P, you mean like every classic MMO, that is worth anything, before... EQ, DAoC, WoW... all subscription based MMOs. The game is beautiful on many levels. Does it need a little care here and there? Yes, and hopefully it gets it. The crafting, although not interactive (cry), leaves you feeling like you have achieved something worthwhile. I'm happy to pay the meager $7 US and plan to sink many hours into this one.

9PHGK0538TXM.title: Commitment and Patience Required; But Worth It
9PHGK0538TXM.text: The game just released and focuses on building, crafting, and exploration. It takes a looooong time to skill up, but that's the intent. This isn't a game with a 60-hour completion. It's something you continuously play and build community around. This game has just released 1.0 and has several continuous releases planned. If you're just starting, you have the opportunity to level up and build your home and marketplace or choose your own adventure before the expansions introduce battle. There are PVP and PVE areas. You are offered multiple weapon crafting choices from swords to spears to magic…

9PHGK0538TXM.title: yes.
9PHGK0538TXM.text: 16 hours in and never ever liked playing MMOs until this game. It's relaxing and there's ALWAYS something to do. Never paid for anything to enjoy the game. Simply just explored the map, continuously build on my plot, and stay curious on what else is out there. Been waiting for a game to release like this. It really scratches the itch. Can't wait to find/ create a clan and build up the community!

9PHGK0538TXM.title: A Review More Recent
9PHGK0538TXM.text: I've been playing since the inclusion to Game Pass back in November 2025 and decided to buy the game and cancel Game Pass. The game does not hold your hand. There is no simple tutorial, but the community will help. It's a social game with several distinct avenues of play. You can be a gatherer, builder, crafter, PVEer, PVPer or find your own mix. You don't have to subscribe, you can maintain a Grace (in-game currency, not money) plot with ease after your first month or you can find a clan that you can get your own room/house within their compound. Also the 2026 road map looks hella fun. Hope…

BNCZHKWRZ7BR.title: I came for the unicorn...
BNCZHKWRZ7BR.text: I came for the unicorn, because it was cute and happy looking. I stayed because I'm not good with closure. See, once I commit to something, I see it through, until it withers and dies on the vine. I spent years trying to extend the life of a mayfly .. turns out my eyesight was pretty bad, the mayfly died within a day and I'd been feeding a pretty pampered spider. In conclusion: If you've read this horrible review up to this point, maybe you're frivolous with your time .. So, buy the game!

9NX6K9HN4F4K.title: Great experience, just play it

9NX6K9HN4F4K.title: Amazing
9NX6K9HN4F4K.text: Best played with a controller. The story grows on me. It's a slow burn, with plenty of names throwed at you in the beginning, but the game have this glossary system which conveniently explain it to you as you read the dialogues. I wish there is an option to turn off the scribbling noise whenever the dialogue pops up. It feels rather irritating.

9NX6K9HN4F4K.title: Well-Written Mystery Adventure RPG
9NX6K9HN4F4K.text: It's probably some of the best writing in gaming, even without voice acting. Very engaging story with good replay value--the story can change drastically depending on your choices, and you can't explore everything in one playthrough. If you're a fan of RPGs or adventure games it's worth your time. A lot of value packed into a 15 hour runtime.

9P1P5Q3BNM7J.title: Similar but Different
9P1P5Q3BNM7J.text: If you've played XCOM you basically know this game, so here's how it differs: • More complex. Lots of moving parts. XCOM is simpler. • Much less cinematic. Music less awesome. None of the cool action shots that XCOM has. • Long. This is more like the Long War mods for XCOM. It's long, you never have enough resources, and sometimes you have to avoid a fight because you need to pick & choose your battles. • Poor UI. XCOM's UI has its issues, but this one is bad. • Gear doesn't change. Some people are bugged by this. There are no gear upgrades. Gear stats are a tradeoff. Gain something, but lose…

The developer, Snapshot, was formed by the original development team that made X-Com: Enemy Unknown and X-Com: Terror From the Deep titles which were published by Microprose back in the 90's. I played those extensively and still have them installed on my PC. They made a fun and challenging game that includes solid gameplay and turn-based strategy. BTW, when starting the game you can choose the…

9PBC1QFBW563.title: Ultrawide Fix
9PBC1QFBW563.text: If your playing at a higher resolution and experience the top and bottom cut off as well as lower reticle heres the fix. Go to C:\Users\User\Saved Games\Arkane Studios\Prey_MS\Game.CFG and delete the line related to hfov then add this line g_reticleYPercentage = 0.5 Save the file and set as read only in properties. That's it. Amazing game!

BQMVWCMB8P59.title: A must-play
BQMVWCMB8P59.text: As one of the so-called "immersive sims" (think Deus Ex, Dishonored, System Shock, Thief, etc.), that lets you experience the game however you want to play. Prey gives you an enormous space station to explore, a conspiracy to solve, and a top-notch story to experience. Arkane Studios - developers of the Dishonored Series, Dark Messiah of Might and Magic, and Arx Fatals - turn their considerable skills from fantasy to sci-fi. It's not a perfect game - the latter half of the game requires a lot of traversal around the station, and load times can be long. And if you want to play it as a straight…

Although, I prefer a soundtrack, this game makes use of the creepy tones throughout the levels with a spattering of soundtrack here and there. 9NBLGGH6H0RV.title: How to fix the lighting
9NBLGGH6H0RV.text: To fix the lighting problem so many of you are having, open nvidia control panel => manage 3D settings =>Program settings => click Add => find 'QuantumBreak.exe' wherever you installed it => scroll down to Vertical sync => set to on.

9P2J7WHV0K4N.title: Decent Game
9P2J7WHV0K4N.text: Don't disable V-Sync, if you do you'll need to edit the config file or the game will refuse to launch. Other than that, the game looks fine, it's smooth, even on moderate hardware with maxed settings at 1080p, I was getting 90-100fps+ consistently. There are a couple bugs I found in the short time I've played. Don't save and expect to load exactly where you just saved. The vehicle I saved next to was just gone when I loaded back in and had to walk because of that bug. For a sort of open sandbox mad max type game, it's fun. It's definitely not a 1-star game.

9P2J7WHV0K4N.title: A fun Far Cry-esque experience (DO NOT TURN OF VSYNC)
9P2J7WHV0K4N.text: The game's fine. A bit repetitive, but it's a solid gameplay loop that has fun combat encounters and well designed arenas to fight them in. If you attempt to turn of Vsync, you will crash the game. The game will continue to crash every time you try to launch the game, and in order to resolve this, you need to get to the settings.ini that's somewhere within your user's profile, and set Vsync=1. This fixed the constant crashing, and the game runs fine on my hardware, but your mileage will vary.

9P2J7WHV0K4N.title: You can fix the never launching bug.
9P2J7WHV0K4N.text: You can fix the crashing and never launching if you type in "Id Software" in the windows search bar, open the file and find settings and open it, then keep looking until you find Vsync and change the 0 to a 1 and save. *Should launch without any problems*

C2DCJ95ZXBMS.title: My favorite game so far in 2019

The combat is fast and frantic, the world is varied and colorful compared to other post apocalyptic games. This is an FPS first and foremost, more Bulletstorm and Doom than Borderlands. The open world aspect is the weakest gameplay aspect, but I'm still enjoying exploring around the varied environments while taking down convoys and bandits. Highly recommended.

9N2S04LGXXH4.title: Amazing game
9N2S04LGXXH4.text: This is a great game. There are no issues with crashes if your PC meets the requirements. If you're trying to play this game on an 8 year old PC and complaining about performance, the problem is YOU, not the game. If you do experience crashes, it's a VRAM issue. Lower your texture settings. You need 12GB of VRAM to comfortably run this at the high texture setting if you are running at high resolutions like 4K.

9P03JGQ4S1GC.title: Crashing issue resolved.
9P03JGQ4S1GC.text: Thanks to player named "JuKING the BOSS" I was able to solve the crashing error. Hit play from your Xbox App as you would, before starting the game; select "options" set your detail to any preference. Then click on "advanced options" and make sure that the box labeled "64 bit rendering" is enabled. Implementing this fix has completely fixed my crashing issue and I have logged 20+ hours with zero crashes.

9P03JGQ4S1GC.title: HOW TO FIX CRASHING
9P03JGQ4S1GC.text: For anyone who has problems with the game crashing, set your monitor refresh rate to 60 Hz. I did this and haven't had a crash since.

9P03JGQ4S1GC.title: Fixed crashing after 10 mins
9P03JGQ4S1GC.text: Before you start the game, go to options. Change the detail to high. Go to advanced and make sure 64-bit render targets is checked. Hope this works for you too.

9MXRG5GCRPXZ.title: what is everyone talking about

9MXRG5GCRPXZ.title: It's Sniper Elite!!
9MXRG5GCRPXZ.text: If you like the Sniper Elite series this one is a pretty decent one into the entry, The maps on this one I actually quite like a lot, The gameplay is more the same which isn't a bad thing but it would be nice if they would add in like a major gameplay changes to mix things up but the overall gameplay is solid and I don't got any performance issues not sure what going on there.

9MXRG5GCRPXZ.title: Enjoy playing

Since the game is brand new, I did come across some tiny bugs, but nothing that has affected the overall gameplay. I wish they added more skins/camos to the game, or added more characters I can purchase or something. You only unlock the characters after beating the campaign, but at that…

9MXRG5GCRPXZ.title: awesome game!

I would like to see more pistols/revolvers, shotguns, bow and arrow, submachine guns, carbine rifles, bolt action/ semi auto rifles, sniper rifles, Light machine guns, more variants of grenades with functions like smoke grenades/ thermite grenades from w.w1 and ww2 of all countries represented. I like to see the luftwaffen drilling use in it proper function as a…

9NP6WL1XQDBW.title: For those that are getting DLL Error
9NP6WL1XQDBW.text: First off, I love this game and have been playing it for 2 months now without issue. Recently, I had been getting the .dll error on startup when it used to work fine previously. I thought this meant I couldn't play the game anymore, but it turns out you can just drag the error message to the corner of the screen without clicking OK and play the game anyways. Apparently, this error is actually caused by a recent Logitech G Hub update, and installing an earlier version of G Hub fixes the issue.

9NP6WL1XQDBW.title: You drive and get stuck. 10/10
9NP6WL1XQDBW.text: If it sounds lame it is. If that sounds fun. Get it. Its more of a vehicle puzzle game than anything else.

9NP6WL1XQDBW.title: Do NOT be DECEIVED by other ratings!!
9NP6WL1XQDBW.text: This is a PHYSICS based game that mimics realistic behaviors in smooth to extreme environments. Ranging benefits from different tire tread, size, and aggressiveness, 4x4 capable, and winch assessible, options that give a Extreme OFFROAD feel for those extreme 4x4 Gasmonkeys and User created content that expands the game for those who want a more casual experience. This game makes you think about your path, not just wing it. The path you take the first time won't be the same coming back. You create new ruts, making it worse each pass. Think like a real 4x4'er and LOCK IT and ROCK IT.

9NP6WL1XQDBW.title: It's so good
9NP6WL1XQDBW.text: Literally one of the best games on gamepass. So worth every minute and even if you know nothing about trucking or trucks (me) its super simple to start and get the hang of it. No reason not to check it out.

9PNRSC0J6DT8.title: PLEASE READ BEFORE BEING DISCOURAGED BY POOR RATINGS
9PNRSC0J6DT8.text: You know I almost didn’t buy this game because of some of the negative reviews. I AM GLAD I listened to the positive. WAAAY better than Mudrunner and a lot more depth. The graphics are gorgeous, the physics are better and pretty decent. As someone else said, if you liked mudrunner, then definitely buy it. It is SO SO SOOOO MUCH better. The steering everyone is complaining about is because it has a delay and isn’t instantaneous reaction from controller stick the wheel turn. That’s because In real life, for those of you old enough to drive will understand, you have to TURN the steering wheel to…

9PNRSC0J6DT8.title: Step learning curve but fantastic game!
9PNRSC0J6DT8.text: I love the slow pace and challenge this game offers. It is easy to get lost in the experience for hours. Persistence's and patience is a must in this game I am new to the series so there was a steep learning curve. It took me 3 restarts to get the hang of this game. I would suggest resets for all tasks not just the contracts. I would also recommend more tutorials for more of the other game mechanics like the crane and loading the cargo onto the truck. I lost spare drill parts by not packing them into the truck as I selected the remove cargo option removing them from the map. Yes it is…

9PNRSC0J6DT8.title: Picky w/ High Expectations- Love It
9PNRSC0J6DT8.text: Almost didn’t buy it. Liked mudrunner, but it was just too rough and aimless for me to continue after a few hours. Here, this game is vastly improved. Contracts and tasks aplenty, large interesting maps (a free fourth one already coming in a few weeks). They did it right

9PNRSC0J6DT8.title: A really great game
9PNRSC0J6DT8.text: Overall, A Really fun game to play and there's definitely a lot to do to keep you playing for quite awhile. They done an awesome job on this one. I highly recommend it.

9N8BRH7PGJMJ.title: Chill base building game
9N8BRH7PGJMJ.text: I'm not sure what's up with all the negativity. Go play Valheim or something if you want combat, this is pure relaxation. There is no rush to the game whatsoever. You want to do as much as possible on the starter island? Go ahead! Do you want to try and speedrun through your playthrough? Completely up to you. Some of y'all have that TikTok dopamine problem and need a fix every 5 seconds or else you are bored with a game looool

9N8BRH7PGJMJ.title: Things To Add
9N8BRH7PGJMJ.text: So far the game is great. But, some things needing added are as follows: - Being able to travel on an airship with your co-op teammates. - Survive swimming in the water on the islands. - Possible farming feature with barn, animals, cooking station, clothing station, etc. - Combat system with some form of predator. - Male character for selection. Thank you for your attention towards my suggestions.

9N8BRH7PGJMJ.title: great game
9N8BRH7PGJMJ.text: Solarpunk is a great game. The day of release i was able to get on and i put 11 hours on that world in that one day that's how great it is. Good job to the 2 devs they made and awesome game

9N8BRH7PGJMJ.title: Cozy
9N8BRH7PGJMJ.text: great game loop. love the art style. not stressful. needs some minor bug fixes but thats to be expected. 10/10

9N221ZTFGQB0.title: Nice game
9N221ZTFGQB0.text: Despite the many reviews attacking this game due to unfortunate timing of release, Sopa is a good game. Sopa has a fun story and a beautiful artstyle. The gameplay and puzzles are simple but it makes for a relaxing game you can complete in an hour or two. You can tell there was a lot of love put into bringing the game together and bringing across its heartwarming message.

9N221ZTFGQB0.title: Sopa & Chill: A Stolen Potato's Journey 😌
9N221ZTFGQB0.text: Welcome to a world that feels like a warm hug and a Ghibli movie rolled into one! 🏡✨ Today, we are diving into Sopa: Tale of the Stolen Potato, a charming, narrative-driven adventure where a simple stolen potato leads to a magical, whimsical journey! Join me (and Miho!) as we explore beautiful South American-inspired landscapes, solve gentle puzzles, chase a mischievous frog, and discover the true meaning of storytelling and family recipes. 🍲💖 It’s the ultimate cozy game experience—perfect with your own warm bowl of soup! Checkout more cozy games @Northest_Sim on Youtube for a full…

9N221ZTFGQB0.title: Love!
9N221ZTFGQB0.text: It's such a sweet, lovely, and nostalgic story! The music and art reminiscent of my own grandma's house was so lovely. This was definitely an act of love. The gameplay was simple but really fun and engaging. I will play it over and over again and hopefully they have new stories coming out toooo

9N221ZTFGQB0.title: Janky but a lot of character
9N221ZTFGQB0.text: Takes some getting used to. There are moments where it feels unfinished, but once I got into it I had a really great time. It's silly, it's funny, it's heartfelt, it hearkens back to classic point-and-click adventures and my kids loved it. Strongly recommend.

BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.title: me when
BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.text: my girlfriend is mad at me because Lara keeps shoving her booty infront of my face every time she gets the chance. The swimming parts are my favorite. 10/10.

BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.title: Great addition to gamepass!
BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.text: Played this a few months ago on another platform but figured I'd add a review here. I'd rate it 4.5 but since gamepass doesn't do half stars I rounded up to 5. This focuses more on exploring tombs which is very welcome. Game is also gorgeous. Story is serviceable enough. The only complaint from me would be that the upgrade tree kinda feels meh.

BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.title: This is a great tomb raider game.
BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.text: The graphics are great, the story is even better. I don't know what is up with all these silly reviews, but if you to play a chill game with a great story line. This is it!

BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.title: Satisfying Conclusion to Trilogy
BNQQ3WVBNZCQ.text: I've played through the entire Tomb Raider reboot trilogy now, and can say that this one is a worthy entry. It is much more puzzle and exploration focused compared to Rise which I enjoyed. The combat is pretty much the same, for better or worse. Negatives are that I hit a couple technical issues and overall found the campaign a bit long for what I was looking for (IMO). Bottomline: If you liked the previous two, you will like this one.

9NJCVGS6T30K.title: Solid quick romp
9NJCVGS6T30K.text: I see a lot of complaints about how short it is. If I paid full price I might be upset about that, but for a GP game that I can beat in 7 hours, I had a great time with it. I'm a busy dad, sometimes a game I can beat in the week is great.

9NJCVGS6T30K.title: Amazing game
9NJCVGS6T30K.text: One of the few games that just makes it easy to keep playing. Great story, great characters, and my god the art and animation. . Some people may say it is bit short, but I think it is just the right length. Amazing game, can't wait to see what these guys do next!!!!

9NJCVGS6T30K.title: Stunning in the best ways
9NJCVGS6T30K.text: The game is gorgeous to not only look at, but the music and story as well. WARNING about the story, it is very deep and if you've experienced the loss of a child, you may feel more pain than you want to go through. But the story is thought invoking and a masterpiece in pain and trauma. Highly recommend this one and I would love to see more of Hazel.

9NJCVGS6T30K.title: Did not disappoint!
9NJCVGS6T30K.text: I was excited to play the game when I first saw the trailer and so far the game does not disappoint. I've made it to chapter 5 so far and have enjoyed it as much as I hoped. The visuals are great. The story is very entertaining. The gameplay is fun, but the combat is a little light so far, although I'm only on chapter 5. In the end I wanted to play this game because it looked like it would have a good story and it does, can't wait to continue it and see how it ends.

C4VLMWJWM7BG.title: Easy Review
C4VLMWJWM7BG.text: If you are a fan of South Park and you also play video games in your spare time, you buy this game. That is all you need to know. Thank you and have a wonderful day.

C4VLMWJWM7BG.title: Fun for a little while. Needs a big discount.
C4VLMWJWM7BG.text: I'm a really big fan of South Park, and I enjoyed how the game's story plays out like episodes of the show. I've also enjoyed customizing my character and exploring the town. The fighting is funny and cool, but fails in terms of fluid, ongoing combat. Half the time characters have to skip turns because their moves are out of range or blocked by allies. When you complete the story there is little to do beyond taking selfies and continuing to beat up any enemies from sixth graders to crabpeople. The DLC is enjoyable but still gives you little to expand upon when completed. Overall the game's…

C0QDQ0KX4HDV.title: Classic South Park
C0QDQ0KX4HDV.text: If you are a fan of South Park you will love this game. It features the same lewd, dirty and politically incorrect content that you see on the TV series. That's what makes this game so great and a definite must have for South Park fans.

C0QDQ0KX4HDV.title: AWESOME
C0QDQ0KX4HDV.text: this game is great for south park fans. would recomend

C0QDQ0KX4HDV.title: Decent RPG with a few issues.
C0QDQ0KX4HDV.text: So, six years after it was released I decided to give this a try. I am an avid fan of South Park, and I think the game's story is one of its strongest qualities. But as a game, I felt frustrated and struggling to enjoy playing it. The combat is difficult to get the hang of, with many moves failing unless executed perfectly. Many of the battles are absurdly difficult, more than they need to be, even on the easiest setting. Simply put this is not a game you will enjoy or benefit from playing on the most difficult setting. The puzzles in this game are insanely cryptic & offer next to no hints,…

9NG5L58FD3X5.title: A beautiful, bittersweet ride.
9NG5L58FD3X5.text: This is the first game I've ever played where I didn't want to complete the objectives. Not because it wasn't fun, it was, not because I didn't want to help the characters, I did, not because I didn't care what happened next, I was curious. It's because once you've helped someone, learned their wants and dislikes, made their food, built their house, listened to their stories... Once you've done everything for them, they leave. You are the Spiritfarer. Your job is to take souls to the hereafter. Even knowing how it has to end, the parting is always bittersweet. The game is beautiful, chill,…

9NG5L58FD3X5.title: just wonderful
9NG5L58FD3X5.text: I started this game not knowing what to expect. Mourning a loss of my own this game was everything I needed to understand wonder of death and the journey of life. I laughed, I cried, I cooked. Thank you for this game. I felt so much better by the time I was done. I would definitely recommend 100%.

9NG5L58FD3X5.title: Wonderful, slow paced game
9NG5L58FD3X5.text: I don't normally like management sim games, but this one caught my eye for some reason. Really cute, wonderful soundtrack, and beautiful art style. The characters are funny and easy to get attached to. I told myself I'd play for 15 minutes at 11pm and 15 minutes later it was 4am

9NG5L58FD3X5.title: A Masterpiece
9NG5L58FD3X5.text: Exquisite and rare game that combines and innovates on gameplay and storytelling to be one of the best games I've ever played. It's fun and relaxing game with an authentically compelling and intelligent story about relationships, meaning, and grief. The art, animation, gameplay, and especially the writing are among the best I've ever played. This game has been a blessing and a balm in a year full of sadness. Thank you.

9PF5Q1B0FHSL.title: Awesome Fast Paced Game

9PF5Q1B0FHSL.title: Love this game!
9PF5Q1B0FHSL.text: Absolutely love the game, I don't know what people are talking about. People just want to hate and be a bunch of followers.

9NLD3ZRWF8DT.title: Heads up on game
9NLD3ZRWF8DT.text: there is a frame rate bug that is released with the pc version of this game where if the game is running higher than 60fps spyro and time based events break. such as spyro sliding across the ground controls not working properly. certain levels with enemies who move on a timer stop working as well. to fix the issue simply set your framerate to 60fps or below and the issues will resolve 59 fps is the perfect spot but just giving everyone a heads up.

9NLD3ZRWF8DT.title: Childhood favorite
9NLD3ZRWF8DT.text: Yay, I'm so excited to play my childhood favorite again and with a little better graphics. A big plus with a better frame rate on my PC too.

9NLD3ZRWF8DT.title: Great game! if u got time play it
9NLD3ZRWF8DT.text: A classic! time to eat some member berrys!

9NLD3ZRWF8DT.title: So Much Fun
9NLD3ZRWF8DT.text: I love platformers and this was so much fun. The art and graphics are amazing, the gameplay is fun and whimsical. Some of the completionist challenges can be difficult but not impossible. Definitely a game I'll be playing again.

BWHFZNSL0PB5.title: I like it!
BWHFZNSL0PB5.text: Everyone says this game is bad, but I really like it and I think it is fun and I would recommend it and you should play it.

BWHFZNSL0PB5.title: Amazing trip down memory lane!
BWHFZNSL0PB5.text: Grew up playing Spyro on PlayStation, so I was stoked to see they had made a remastered version, especially since it was available on Xbox. This game is phenomenal, it's like the "same" game but completely different at the same time. I love it! All the detail is brilliant! Amazingly fun game for all ages!

BWHFZNSL0PB5.title: Amazing - so much fun
BWHFZNSL0PB5.text: So to start off, 10/5 - AWESOME. If you’ve never played this before you may may not get as much enjoyment out of it. I played all the Spyro games as a kid so it’s like a stroll down memory lane. The first 5 minutes of this game had me laughing and giddy just like I was as a kid. I got stuck in the same place, but overcame it. This game makes me feel like I’m 8 years old again. It takes the complexity of life and takes you to a place you can escape to. The nostalgia is amazing, I would’ve bought it if it was $75. You won’t regret this purchase. Go be a kid again.

BWHFZNSL0PB5.title: Childhood relived
BWHFZNSL0PB5.text: Personally I loved this game growing up. I easily put in at least 300hrs as a kid playing it over and over. If you played it as a kid you're gonna want to play this. Activison did a fantastic job remaking this game. Thanks for everyone involved in the development of this game for fulfilling my desire to relive my childhood absolutely enjoyed every second of it.

9MT19Q3CRMQZ.title: Simply Fun
9MT19Q3CRMQZ.text: Would defiantly recommend this game to anyone who likes space, or driving games. Provides a solid survival-logistics experience with great difficulty options to cater to the casual or more intense gamer. Whoever made this game gets it. Also, props to the devs for making the game bug free. 17 hours and not one crash or hick up. I'll be looking for more Raw Fury titles in the future

9MT19Q3CRMQZ.title: Great Solo Space Truck Sim
9MT19Q3CRMQZ.text: If you enjoy trucking heavy loads and space, then look no further.

9MT19Q3CRMQZ.title: Its a Jam
9MT19Q3CRMQZ.text: Super fun trucking simulator with style and depth. Every bad review I've read makes it feel like they haven't even played the game. yes there is cruise control. yes you can get out of your chair and use the shop again. Its supposed to be slow to steer it's a trucking simulator. How can you hate on a cheap game that is only 5 gigs and is fun, while "AAA" studios pump out the same garbage. Good for the devs for making a great game that I will continue to put time into while I relax.

9MT19Q3CRMQZ.title: Really well executed and fun game
9MT19Q3CRMQZ.text: This is a unique twist on space and driving games to me. I really enjoy playing it, especially the interactions with the story players. It does have a bit of a learning curve and it might frustrate some, but if you relax and take it all in I think you will have fun. There are some QOL things that I think the devs need to work on (UCC monitoring capability, Straps to hold boxes down, etc.) , but I am sure they will. The graphics are really well done and the physics to driving the Star Truck in space are pretty darn awesome, albeit frustrating if you try to be a hot rod like me. Then again,…

C2CSDTSCBZ0C.title: The ’Rogue One’ of Star Wars Games
C2CSDTSCBZ0C.text: Respawn continues to amaze me. I had little doubt about this game since Titanfall 2 is one of my favorites. This game really feels like Star Wars. At first, you feel like a Padawan but by the end, you'll feel like a Jedi Knight. That's no delusion of grandeur. Your skills are earned and not over the top like in The Force Unleashed. The story could easily be adapted into a Star Wars Story movie or series. The new characters are compelling and the acting is spot on. As much as I want Titanfall 3, I can't wait for a sequel to this game.

C2CSDTSCBZ0C.title: Best Star Wars game yet
C2CSDTSCBZ0C.text: It has Amazing graphics and even better plot line, EA actually did a good job on this after the Battle Front 2 disaster.

C2CSDTSCBZ0C.title: Great experience! And a note to the game designers...
C2CSDTSCBZ0C.text: There are many great things about this game and I was surprised how low the reviews have been so far. One of my favorite things about this game is the spectacular slow-motion, battle animations. They really make you feel like a jedi! Another great things is that you get to travel to 4 different planets and do different adventures on each. If any of the game designers do read this review, please make more planets! I haven't yet finished the game, but so far it has been an awesome experience!

C2CSDTSCBZ0C.title: Now this is podracing!
C2CSDTSCBZ0C.text: This game is awesome and fulfills the need for a good single player Star Wars experience. My only complaint is that there could be more planets--there's certainly room for more on the holotable.

9P87S3NP6SR2.title: Good Star Wars Stealth Game
9P87S3NP6SR2.text: Do you like Star Wars? Do you like stealth games? If so, you’ll like this game. Not complicated 🤷🏻‍♂️

BRXTM276DLPR.title: Underrated Game!
BRXTM276DLPR.text: I don't understand the hate...Its a great game!

BRXTM276DLPR.text: awesome multiplayer action provides fun for lots of ages. lots of game modes and weapons let you personalize your play. if you don't want to play with others, you can play on your own in "skirmish" mode. you can also play missions with a friend in local play. its $30 but totally worth it. have fun!

C0GWTPD0S8S1.title: A 2019 Must Play
C0GWTPD0S8S1.text: Even though I never really had an issue with the micro-transactions at launch (I felt like I still could compete with the players that had paid their way to purple cards, and seeing these same over leveled players in game motivated me to grind just because I was able to visualize just how unstoppable I would be once I reached those same levels), this game has consistently been my go to for a fast paced shooters, eliminating games like COD and Battlefield from the equation entirely. However, part my dedication toward Battlefront 2 comes from being a Star Wars fanboy. Regardless, this game…

C0GWTPD0S8S1.title: Second chances
C0GWTPD0S8S1.text: Alright we all know how this started. I got it waited a year for it to fix itself, now the game has become the Star Wars multiplayer game that I love it has become so good way more the expectations.

C0GWTPD0S8S1.title: TAKING A WALK ON THE DARKSIDE
C0GWTPD0S8S1.text: Not bad as everyone was saying...But again I just bought this game a few days ago so I didn't get a chance to see how bad it was before the big update. But I can tell it worked. I'm a little unhappy with the matchmaking but its not bad. Get ready to be killed with 2 shots from players who are at level 77 and your trying to rank up to 7. Besides that, graphics and game play is perfect. For $10 you cant go wrong.

C0GWTPD0S8S1.title: Nowhere near as bad as people claim, give it a shot.
C0GWTPD0S8S1.text: I gave this game a 5 but tbh I consider it a 4, I just picked 5 to counter all the ridiculous 1 star reviews. This game is way better than you think, I've seen some people complain that they get destroyed by people with Lvl 4 star cards but that's just the price to pay for dropping in so late in the game and it's the same as any other multiplayer game in which you unlock better equipment the higher you go. I bought this game about 2 months ago and I already have most troops at level 40-70, you just have to grind and play just like any other game. The game looks beautiful and the soundtrack is…

BV9CWVQWNS4P.title: one of the best
BV9CWVQWNS4P.text: the game requires strategy and communication with teammates but overall its a great game. and pc players arent really hard to eliminate

9MWR1NC6VQ6L.title: 10/10 Game, Very relaxing and easy
9MWR1NC6VQ6L.text: I'm a 13 year old that suffers with autism and I cant handle a lot of things a once or an un easy schedule. this game has made me relax and let loose a bit. I can go on a set schedule or I can just farm, there is a lot that you can do here.

9MWR1NC6VQ6L.title: Would be perfect if it supported Cross-saving with xbox
9MWR1NC6VQ6L.text: I hate that my save isn't recognized. I'd love to be able to pick up and use the same save on xbox, PC, and the cloud.

9MWR1NC6VQ6L.title: yoooo

9MWR1NC6VQ6L.title: I Changed Him
9MWR1NC6VQ6L.text: This game introduced to me my lifelong true love. He was down and out. Hopeless. And I changed him for the better. And now, he shares his love for blue chickens, pizza, and beer. What more could a partner want? Thank you Stardew. You made my life complete.

C3D891Z6TNQM.title: "One more day!"
C3D891Z6TNQM.text: Be careful. Once you start playing you will not stop. That sounds silly - but you will really not stop.

C3D891Z6TNQM.title: Awesome, but I'd like crossplay
C3D891Z6TNQM.text: Great game, I really love all the possibilities and opportunities, tough I sometimes find it difficult to get the large sums of gold it asks for, e.g. the large heaps of money the Junimos ask for in return for bus repair (Though maybe that's just me, I'm treash at saving money in-game). 9NCJSXWZTP88.title: Great Game (DO NOT PUT ON YOUR HDD!!!)
9NCJSXWZTP88.text: F'n A. I played this game for about 40 hours on my HDD dealing with stutters, audio sync issues, loading screens taking forever, etc. I didn't notice until last night that it was on my HDD; I was thinking this was how it was optimized with my 4080 / i9 and was waiting endlessly for a patch or driver update... So, I reinstalled onto my SSD and the game is flawless on 4k/60fps. Some minor dips here and there, but gawd damn, it is nothing like the pain I endured. This game is awesome. F the h8rs - I picture them in those obnoxious 'Dancer Suits'

9NXQPGMR917R.title: Advice for New Players

I watched maybe 20 minutes of E3PO and a few other short beginner guides and my 3rd empire took the galaxy by storm. Turn the difficulty to Ensign, turn on AI empire scaling so they don't start off too powerful, and just try to learn the systems through experimentation or guides. Again turn off the tutorial and…

9NVR4ZQKNBSB.title: READ IF YOUR GAME FREEZES ON START
9NVR4ZQKNBSB.text: I also had this issue but mine is working now. I had to search forums for a while but found the answer. The reason its freezing is because Game Pass is trying to bring up the account selection window. If you wait a couple minutes or so BEFORE you "Press A to Start", then the window will appear. after you do this for the first time, it should never freeze on you again, you should be able to "Press A to Start" immediately. Hope this helps. Upvote so its seen more.

9PN3VDFTB5HZ.title: The Chandler Bing of Video Games

Really funny all while having a level up system, melee combat with multiple weapon types, ranged combat (bows) and using your lute to summon all different sorts of allies as you attempt to rescue the princess with promises of lust and wealth awaiting ye!

BRKX5CRMRTC2.title: An Expansive World, An Unbeatable Price
BRKX5CRMRTC2.text: The Elder Scrolls Online has grown immensely since its first release. After a rocky start the team at ZOS turned this game around and did an amazing job listening to their fans to build an amazing Elder Scrolls and MMO experience. Now after the release of their second expansion, the base game has a huge amount of content for it's price. You have access to huge zones, almost limitless quests and a fantastic PvP system. Couldn't recommend this amazing game more, no matter what you've heard, it is absolutely worth it's price now.
